loveZh: 咸是六十四卦中的「恋爱卦」：少男少女相感，无心而通。今日心动的信号格外真实——那种说不清原因的舒服与吸引，值得认真对待；表白、告白、深度交心的成功率处于年度高位。有伴者今日宜「感应式相处」：放下手机，感受对方的状态并回应它——被感知到的感觉，就是被爱的感觉。
loveEn: Influence is the canon's courtship hexagram: youthful energies resonating without contrivance. Today's flutters are unusually trustworthy — that inexplicable ease and pull deserves your attention; confessions and deep disclosures enjoy their best odds of the year. Partnered? Practice resonant presence: put the phone down, sense your partner's actual state, and answer it — for the feeling of being sensed is the feeling of being loved.
wealthZh: 咸主感而遂通，今日对市场情绪、消费心理的感知敏锐，适合做与「人心」相关的财务判断：什么会火、谁在恐慌、哪里有需求。但「憧憧往来」是陷阱：心思往来不定、跟着感觉频繁操作必乱。感应用于洞察，决策仍靠纪律——心动的标的先入观察池，过了冷静期再出手。
wealthEn: Influence connects through feeling: your read on market sentiment and consumer psychology is sharp today — good for judgments about what will catch, who is panicking, where desire pools. The trap is the restless line — 'agitated coming and going': trading on every tremor of feeling breeds chaos. Let resonance inform insight while discipline makes decisions: the exciting ticker enters the watchlist first, and acts only after the cooling period.
healthZh: 山泽通气，身体的感受性今日全开：对疲劳、紧张、不适的信号比平时敏感数倍——这是身体在跟你说话，认真听。做一次「身体扫描」冥想：从头到脚感受每个部位的状态。情绪与躯体今日高度联动：心里的压力会立刻变成肩颈的僵硬，处理情绪就是处理疼痛。人际的触碰也有疗愈力：拥抱、按摩，皮肤记得温度。
healthEn: Mountain and lake breathing together: bodily sensitivity runs wide open today — signals of fatigue, tension, and unease register at several times normal gain. That is the body speaking; listen properly. Do a body-scan meditation, crown to sole. Mind and soma are tightly coupled today: mental pressure converts instantly to shoulder and neck rigidity, so treating the emotion treats the pain. Touch heals too — the hug, the massage; skin remembers warmth.
xiangZh: 山上有泽，咸；君子以虚受人。
xiangEn: A lake on the mountain: influence; thus the superior man keeps his mind open to receive others.

guaciZh: 恒：亨，无咎，利贞。利有攸往。
guaciEn: Duration: success, no blame. Perseverance furthers. It furthers to have somewhere to go.
modernZh: 雷风相与，恒久之道。今日宜坚持既定方向，按部就班，不宜朝三暮四或中途变卦。持之以恒，细水长流。
modernEn: Thunder and wind together: duration. Stay the course today — consistency in work and relationships beats novelty and change.
careerZh: 恒卦雷风相与，动而有常——今日的主题是「可持续」。检验手头的工作方式：现在的节奏能撑三年吗？不能，就今日调整。宜做长期主义的事：维护老客户、深耕核心技能、完善可复用的流程；忌朝三暮四——跳槽念头、转行冲动今日先冷藏，「不恒其德，或承之羞」。恒不是僵化：雷风相与，在坚守方向的前提下随时更新方法。
careerEn: Duration: thunder and wind in partnership — motion with constancy. Today's theme is sustainability. Stress-test your current working mode: can this pace hold for three years? If not, adjust it today. Favor the long-game moves: tend old clients, deepen the core craft, build reusable process. Shelve the job-hop impulse and the pivot fantasy — 'he who does not steady his character meets disgrace.' But duration isn't rigidity: thunder and wind renew constantly — hold the direction, refresh the method.
loveZh: 恒是「长久之道」的卦：激情会退潮，让关系穿越时间的是「立不易方」——可预期的忠诚与稳定的日常。今日适合建立两人的「恒」：固定的晚餐时间、每周的散步、睡前的十分钟聊天——仪式般的重复是感情的骨骼。已有的承诺今日重申一遍：老夫老妻的「我爱你」，比热恋期的更有分量。
loveEn: Duration is the hexagram of lasting: passion ebbs by design, and what carries a bond across time is 'standing firm without changing direction' — predictable loyalty and a steady shared rhythm. Build your constancies today: the fixed dinner hour, the weekly walk, ten minutes of talk before sleep — ritual repetition is love's skeleton. And restate the old commitment aloud: an 'I love you' in year ten outweighs any in month one.
wealthZh: 恒卦理财的答案只有一个词：定投。今日检查你的长期计划是否还在轨道上——中断的定投恢复它，漂移的配置再平衡它。财富在恒卦的世界观里是时间的函数：本金×收益率×坚持年数，最后一项权重最大。今日勿被短期波动摇出局：「振恒，凶」——最大的风险不是市场，是拿不住。
wealthEn: Duration's entire financial doctrine is one word: consistency. Audit the long-term plan today — resume the lapsed contributions, rebalance the drifted allocation. In this hexagram's worldview wealth is a function of time: principal × rate × years held, and the last variable carries the most weight. Don't get shaken out by this week's noise — 'restlessness as an enduring state brings misfortune': the greatest risk isn't the market, it's the grip.
healthZh: 恒卦把健康的真相说透了：起作用的从来不是猛烈的短期冲刺，而是十年如一日的微小重复。今日选定你的「恒」项目——每天七千步、每晚十一点睡、每周三次训练——标准放低到「绝不会中断」的程度。雷风相与：内容可以换（今天跑步明天游泳），节律不能断。已坚持的习惯今日给自己记一功：你正在做最难的事。
healthEn: Duration tells health's plain truth: what works was never the violent sprint but the small repetition sustained for a decade. Choose your constancy today — seven thousand daily steps, lights out at eleven, three weekly sessions — and set the bar low enough that breaking it is impossible. Thunder-and-wind flexibility applies: the content may rotate (run today, swim tomorrow); the rhythm may not break. And credit yourself for the habits already held: you are doing the hardest thing there is.
xiangZh: 雷风恒；君子以立不易方。
xiangEn: Thunder and wind: duration; thus the superior man stands firm and does not change his direction.

guaciZh: 遯：亨。小利贞。
guaciEn: Retreat: success. In what is small, perseverance furthers.
modernZh: 天下有山，退避之象。今日宜退不宜进，避开是非与纠缠。从容抽身不是逃跑，而是智慧。退一步，海阔天空。
modernEn: The mountain rises under heaven: retreat. Step back gracefully today — distance from conflict is strategy, not defeat.
careerZh: 遯卦二阴渐长、四阳宜退，天下有山——小人得势、环境转差时，君子的上策是体面撤退。今日适合的「遯」：从消耗性的争斗中抽身、从注定失败的项目里解绑、与是非之人拉开距离。「不恶而严」是遯的艺术：不撕破脸、不发泄怨气，微笑着把边界立起来。退不是输——「肥遯」（从容的退）是为了保存实力，在更好的位置再入场。
careerEn: Retreat: two yin lines advancing, four yang wisely withdrawing — when lesser influences gain and conditions sour, the superior strategy is dignified withdrawal. Today's retreats: extract yourself from the attritional fight, unbind from the doomed project, put distance between yourself and the troublemakers. The art is 'not with hatred, but with reserve': no scorched earth, no vented grievance — just a boundary raised with a smile. Retreat isn't loss: the 'unhurried retreat' preserves your force for re-entry on better ground.
loveZh: 感情今日需要「战略性距离」：黏得太紧的关系松一松，吵到胶着的话题放一放——遯卦说，此刻的退开不是冷漠，是给关系留出呼吸的空间。各自安排一天独处：TA见TA的朋友，你读你的书,傍晚再交换彼此的一天。距离产生的不是疏远，是重新看见对方的角度。纠缠不清的暧昧或消耗性的关系，今日是止损离场的好日子。
loveEn: Love needs strategic distance today: loosen the over-tight closeness, table the deadlocked argument — Retreat says stepping back now isn't coldness but giving the bond room to breathe. Spend the day separately: their friends, your book, then trade stories at dusk. Distance yields not estrangement but a fresh angle of seeing. And for the tangled situationship or the draining connection — today is a fine day to walk away whole.
wealthZh: 遯主退避，财务上是「落袋」信号：涨了很久的仓位逢高减一部分，赚了钱的项目分批了结——「肥遯，无不利」，从容退出的人没有输家。新的投资邀约今日多看少动，尤其警惕需要你「现在就决定」的机会。消费上也宜退：退掉不用的订阅、退出烧钱的圈子。今日的减法，都是明天的安全垫。
wealthEn: Retreat signals profit-taking: trim the long-rallied position into strength, harvest the winning venture in tranches — 'the unhurried retreat: nothing that does not further'; no one exits calmly and loses. View new pitches today from a distance, especially anything demanding a decision right now. Subtract in spending too: cancel the unused subscriptions, exit the expensive social circuits. Every subtraction today is tomorrow's cushion.
healthZh: 天下有山，退而自守——今日是身体的「撤退日」：从喧嚣中退入安静，从日程中退出留白。最应景的安排：独处半天、关掉通知、散步冥想或早睡。社交消耗型的人今日恢复系统超负荷，「远小人」的健康版是远离让你紧绷的人与场合。退到山里（哪怕只是公园）走一走：自然是最古老的疗愈舱。
healthEn: The mountain rises under heaven — withdraw and keep yourself. Today is the body's retreat day: from noise into quiet, from schedule into margin. The fitting agenda: half a day alone, notifications off, a walking meditation or an early night. If people-time drains you, your recovery system is overloaded — the health version of 'keeping the inferior at a distance' is distancing whoever keeps you clenched. And retreat to a mountain, or at least a park: nature remains the oldest recovery pod.
xiangZh: 天下有山，遯；君子以远小人，不恶而严。
xiangEn: The mountain under heaven: retreat; thus the superior man keeps the inferior at a distance — not with anger, but with dignity.

guaciZh: 大壮：利贞。
guaciEn: Great Power: perseverance furthers.
modernZh: 雷在天上，声势壮大。今日精力充沛，气势正盛，宜大胆推进正当之事。但壮不可妄，恃强冒进必有悔。
modernEn: Thunder in heaven: great power. Strong momentum backs righteous moves today — but power without restraint invites regret.
careerZh: 大壮卦雷在天上，四阳盛长——力量与声势都在你这边：方案有人听、资源调得动、气场压得住场。今日可推进平时推不动的硬仗：要资源、争立项、上难度。但大壮的全部风险浓缩在「羝羊触藩」的意象里：公羊逞勇顶篱笆，角被卡住进退不得——仗着势强硬顶规则、硬怼关键人物，就是今日的触藩。「非礼弗履」：势越大，越要走在规矩内。
careerEn: Great Power: thunder above heaven, four yang lines surging — force and momentum are yours: proposals get heard, resources move, your presence holds the room. Push the usually-unpushable today: claim the budget, win the mandate, raise the difficulty. But the hexagram's entire risk is compressed into one image — the ram butting the hedge, horns stuck, able neither to advance nor retreat. Using strength to bulldoze rules or key people is today's hedge. 'Tread no path contrary to order': the greater the power, the more precisely inside the lines.
loveZh: 感情里今日火力充沛：追求可以大胆直接，表白可以掷地有声——大壮的气场自带吸引力。但强与横只隔一线：把「我想要」凌驾于「TA愿意」之上，魅力立刻变成压力。今日尤其注意：争论中你的嗓门与气势容易失控，「雷在天上」的音量吓不出爱，只能吓出距离。力量最动人的用法，是为对方撑伞而不是打雷。
loveEn: Full firepower in love today: pursue boldly, declare resoundingly — Great Power's aura attracts on its own. But strong and overbearing sit one line apart: the instant 'I want' overrides 'they're willing,' magnetism becomes pressure. Watch the argument especially — your volume and force escalate easily, and thunder overhead never frightened anyone into love, only into distance. Power's most winning use is holding the umbrella, not hurling the bolt.
wealthZh: 大壮的财运强而躁：收入攻势凌厉，谈判筹码在手，宜趁势拿下该拿的合同与价码。投资端却是危险的性格放大器：行情配合时人最容易「羝羊触藩」——加杠杆、追热点、重仓单一标的。今日铁律：气势归气势，仓位归仓位；每笔操作问一句「若判断错误，退路在哪」——公羊顶篱笆前从不问这个问题。
wealthEn: Great Power's money runs strong and hot: your earning offensive is sharp, negotiating chips in hand — close the contracts and prices you deserve on this tide. But in markets the hexagram is a personality amplifier of the dangerous kind: when the tape agrees with you, the ram appears — leverage, momentum-chasing, the oversized single bet. Iron rule today: confidence is not position size; before each trade ask 'where is the exit if I'm wrong' — the one question the ram never asks before the hedge.
healthZh: 雷在天上，体能达到峰值区间：今日破个人纪录的机会来了——加重量、提配速、上强度都有身体支持。但大壮的伤病警告同样明确：力量感爆棚的日子正是拉伤、扭伤、肌肉撕裂的高发日，因为「感觉能行」总是跑在「实际能行」前面。热身加倍认真，进阶控制在10%以内，护具戴好。「非礼弗履」的健身版：暴力美学不属于训练场。
healthEn: Thunder above heaven: physical capacity enters its peak band — today the personal record is genuinely available; heavier, faster, harder all have the body's backing. But Great Power's injury warning is equally explicit: the day strength feels limitless is the high season of strains, sprains, and tears, because 'feels possible' always runs ahead of 'is possible.' Double the warm-up, cap progression at ten percent, wear the supports. The training-floor version of 'tread only with order': violence aesthetics belong nowhere near a barbell.
xiangZh: 雷在天上，大壮；君子以非礼弗履。
xiangEn: Thunder in heaven above: great power; thus the superior man does not tread upon paths that do not accord with order.

guaciZh: 晋：康侯用锡马蕃庶，昼日三接。
guaciEn: Progress: the powerful prince is honored with horses in large numbers and received three times in a single day.
modernZh: 明出地上，晋升之象。今日运势如旭日东升，事业有进，易得赏识提拔。大胆展现自己，光明磊落地前进。
modernEn: The sun rises over the earth: progress. Advancement and recognition come easily today — step into the light and move forward openly.
careerZh: 晋卦明出地上，太阳从地平线升起——上升通道正式打开：晋升、调岗、被点名、被授权，今日的每一次曝光都在为你的轨迹加速。「康侯用锡马蕃庶，昼日三接」：受重用的机会一天可来多次，全部接住。策略是「自昭明德」：主动展示而非等待发现——更新你的成果清单，在合适的场合让关键的人看见。晋升期的姿态要「晋如摧如」：前进中保持谦稳，升得快更要站得住。
careerEn: Progress: brightness rising over the earth — the ascent channel formally opens: promotion, transfer, being named, being mandated; every exposure today accelerates your trajectory. 'The prince is honored with horses and received three times in one day': opportunities for advancement may arrive repeatedly — catch them all. The strategy is 'brighten your own virtue': display deliberately rather than await discovery — refresh the achievements list, and let the right people see it in the right rooms. And keep the rising posture steady: the faster the climb, the firmer the footing must be.
loveZh: 感情如日东升，能见度与好感度同步上涨：单身者今日的每一次出场都值得认真打扮——被注意到的概率处于高位，主动开口的成功率也是。有伴者宜把关系「晋」一级：公开、见家长、订计划，今日推进名分之事顺风顺水。「昼日三接」的感情版：珍惜今日多次出现的小美好，别让好日子过成寻常日。
loveEn: Love rises like the morning sun — visibility and favor climb together. Singles: dress for every appearance today; the odds of being noticed sit at a high, and so do the odds when you speak first. Partnered: promote the relationship one rank — go public, meet the parents, set the plan; matters of status move with the wind today. And the romantic reading of 'received three times in a day': savor each small brightness as it comes — don't spend a shining day as if it were ordinary.
wealthZh: 晋主上进，财运处在爬坡段：谈加薪、要预算、提价、投简历，今日的「向上要」类操作成功率明显偏高——太阳升起时，人们对光的出价最慷慨。投资上适合布局「上升期资产」：处于成长通道的行业与标的。「失得勿恤」是晋卦的心法：小的得失别纠结，眼睛盯着上升的主线。
wealthEn: Progress puts money on an ascending slope: the raise conversation, the budget request, the price increase, the application — every 'ask upward' enjoys visibly better odds today, for people bid most generously for light while the sun is rising. In investing, position in ascent-phase assets — sectors and names inside a growth channel. The hexagram's mental key: 'gain or loss, do not fret' — release the small fluctuations and track the rising mainline.
healthZh: 明出地上，是身体节律与太阳同步的最佳日：今日务必早起接住晨光——日光是重置生物钟、提振血清素最便宜的处方。运动安排在白天做「上升系」：爬山、爬楼、跳绳，向上的动作应和向上的气。「自昭明德」的健康版是自我肯定：今日照镜子时对自己说一句好话——心理的日出，和生理的一样重要。
healthEn: Brightness over the earth — the best day to sync your rhythm with the sun: rise early and catch the morning light; sunlight remains the cheapest prescription for resetting the clock and lifting serotonin. Keep exercise diurnal and ascending — the hill, the stairs, the jump rope; upward movement matches the rising qi. And the health reading of 'brighten your own virtue' is self-regard: say one kind sentence to the mirror today — the psychological sunrise matters as much as the physical one.
xiangZh: 明出地上，晋；君子以自昭明德。
xiangEn: The sun rises over the earth: progress; thus the superior man himself brightens his bright virtue.

guaciZh: 明夷：利艰贞。
guaciEn: Darkening of the Light: in adversity, it furthers to be persevering.
modernZh: 明入地中，光明受抑。今日环境不利，才华易受压制，宜藏锋守拙、内明外顺。艰难中守住内心的光，不露不争。
modernEn: Light sinks beneath the earth: darkening. Keep your brilliance veiled today — endure quietly, protect your inner light, and avoid confrontation.
careerZh: 明夷卦明入地中，光被大地吞没——环境对才华不友好：功劳被拿走、建议被无视、能人被打压。今日的生存智慧是「用晦而明」：把聪明藏进朴拙里——少发言、多记录，重要成果留好凭证，关键立场不轻易亮出。这不是懦弱而是箕子之明：在黑暗中保全内心的火种。「莅众用晦」：即使带团队也宜低调行事。记住明夷的承诺：光只是入地，不是熄灭。
careerEn: Darkening of the Light: brightness swallowed by the earth — the environment is hostile to talent: credit taken, counsel ignored, the capable suppressed. Survival wisdom today is 'veiled, yet luminous': fold your intelligence into plainness — speak less, document more, keep receipts for the key results, and don't show your full hand. This isn't cowardice but the clarity of Prince Chi: preserving the inner flame through the dark. Even leading a team, lead quietly today. And hold the hexagram's promise: the light has gone underground, not out.
loveZh: 感情正过「用晦」的日子：环境的压力（家人反对、流言、现实困难）压着两人的光。今日不宜对外高调，也不宜内部摊牌——黑暗期的谈判总带着绝望的杂音。策略是「内难而能正其志」：对外收敛锋芒，对内互相确认——一句「我知道现在难，但我没打算走」，是明夷之日最有力的情话。独自伤心的人：把心事写下来而非咽下去，晦而不郁。
loveEn: Love is in its veiled season: outside pressure — disapproving family, gossip, hard circumstances — presses down on your shared light. Neither flaunt outward nor force the reckoning inward today; negotiations held in the dark always carry despair's static. The strategy is the hexagram's own: composed outside, resolved within — 'I know it's hard right now, and I'm not going anywhere' is the strongest possible sentence on Darkening's day. And if you grieve alone: write the weight down rather than swallowing it — veiled need not mean festering.
wealthZh: 明夷主藏，财务上全面转入隐蔽模式：收入、资产、投资动向今日一概不宜示人——「财不露白」在明夷之日是保命符,炫耀即靶心。市场层面能见度极低：消息面混浊、数据失真，看不清就不下注，持币等天亮。警惕黑暗中的「引路人」：越是艰难时出现的「带你赚钱」的人，越要按捕食者预处理。
wealthEn: Darkening hides: finances go fully covert today — income, assets, and moves shown to no one; invisibility is the amulet, display the bullseye. Market visibility is near zero: noisy narratives, distorted data — where you cannot see, do not bet; hold cash until dawn. And beware guides who appear in the dark: whoever materializes in your hardest hour offering to 'lead you to money' gets processed as a predator first.
healthZh: 明入地中，情绪的光也容易转暗：低落、提不起劲、自我怀疑是明夷之日的常见天气——首先知道这是天气，不是你的本质。对策有三：光照（白天尽量见太阳，哪怕阴天出门走走）、倾诉（选一个绝对安全的人，说出来一半就化了）、微小成就（完成一件五分钟的小事，给心里点一盏灯）。若黑暗持续多日不散，寻求专业帮助是「用晦而明」的最高形式。
healthEn: When brightness enters the earth, the mood's light dims too: flatness, depletion, self-doubt are this hexagram's weather — and knowing it is weather, not your nature, is step one. Three responses: light (get under the open sky daily, overcast counts), voicing (tell one absolutely safe person; half the weight dissolves in the telling), and micro-wins (finish one five-minute task to light one small lamp inside). If the dark persists day after day, professional help is the highest form of 'veiled, yet luminous.'
xiangZh: 明入地中，明夷；君子以莅众，用晦而明。
xiangEn: The light sinks into the earth: darkening; thus the superior man lives with the multitude — veiling his brightness, yet still shining.

guaciZh: 家人：利女贞。
guaciEn: The Family: the perseverance of the woman furthers.
modernZh: 风自火出，家人之象。今日宜关注家庭与亲近之人，内部和睦则外事顺利。各安其位、各尽其责，温暖自在其中。
modernEn: Wind issues from fire: the family. Tend to home and close bonds today — inner harmony becomes outer strength.
careerZh: 家人卦风自火出——风由火生，由内向外：一切外部影响力都从「内部经营」开始。今日适合修炼组织的内功：理顺团队分工（「男女正」的现代版是人岗匹配）、明确规则边界、关照成员状态。「言有物而行有恒」是今日的管理要诀：说话有干货，执行有定力。你的小团队今日的和睦度，就是下个季度战斗力的先行指标。
careerEn: The Family: wind issues from fire — generated within, blowing outward: all external influence begins with internal order. Cultivate the organization's inner strength today: align roles to people (the modern reading of 'each in right place'), clarify rules and boundaries, check on your members' actual state. The Image gives the management key: 'substance in words, constancy in conduct.' Your small team's harmony today is next quarter's leading indicator of firepower.
loveZh: 家人卦是「家」的本卦，今日感情的主场在家里：推掉应酬回家吃饭，一起收拾房间，聊聊家庭的近期计划——经营感今日胜过浪漫感。谈婚论嫁、见家长、讨论同居安排都是顺卦而行。「家人嗃嗃，悔厉吉」：家里立规矩严一点无妨，但「妇子嘻嘻」失了分寸反而凶——温暖与边界并存，才是家人卦的家。
loveEn: This is the home hexagram, and love's venue today is the household itself: decline the engagement, eat at home, tidy a room together, talk near-term family plans — stewardship outranks romance today. Marriage talk, meeting parents, and cohabitation planning all move with the grain. The lines counsel balance: a household run a shade strict recovers well, but one where all boundary dissolves into giggling ends badly — warmth and structure together make this hexagram's home.
wealthZh: 家人主齐家，今日是家庭财务的「联席会议日」：和伴侣或家人打开账本对齐——收入几何、开销去向、储蓄目标、大额计划，全部摊在桌面。「富家大吉」的路径是分工协作：谁管日常、谁管投资、应急金放哪，各正其位。个人开支今日也回归「治家」视角：每笔钱问一句——这是在建设我的家，还是在消耗它？
wealthEn: The Family orders the household — today convene the family finance council: open the books with your partner or kin and align on income, outflows, savings targets, and major plans, everything on the table. The path to 'enriching the family, great fortune' is division of labor: who runs the daily ledger, who tends investments, where the emergency fund lives — each in the right seat. Filter personal spending through the household lens too: does this money build my home, or consume it?
healthZh: 风自火出，健康的火苗也从家里点燃：今日适合把家改造成健康的主场——清一次冰箱（撤掉垃圾食品）、给卧室做睡眠优化（遮光、降温、屏幕出房间）、全家约一次散步或体检。家人的健康互相传染，好习惯也是：你今晚早睡，孩子和伴侣都会跟上。「行有恒」：家庭健康公约立起来，贴在冰箱上。
healthEn: Wind from fire: the health flame too is kindled at home. Renovate the home field today — purge the fridge of junk, optimize the bedroom for sleep (dark, cool, screens exiled), book the family walk or the family checkup. Health is contagious within a household, and so are good habits: sleep early tonight and your partner and children will drift after you. 'Constancy in conduct': draft the family health pact and post it on the refrigerator.
xiangZh: 风自火出，家人；君子以言有物而行有恒。
xiangEn: Wind comes forth from fire: the family; thus the superior man has substance in his words and constancy in his conduct.

guaciZh: 睽：小事吉。
guaciEn: Opposition: in small matters, good fortune.
modernZh: 火上泽下，乖离之象。今日易有分歧误会，大事难合，小事可成。求同存异，不必强求一致，保持沟通即可。
modernEn: Fire above, lake below: opposition. Expect friction and mixed aims today — small matters succeed, grand alliances don't. Agree to differ.
careerZh: 睽卦火上泽下，火升水降，背向而行——今日会议桌上的分歧比平时多：立场相左、目标错位、鸡同鸭讲。睽卦的处世策略是「小事吉」：大共识达不成就先做小合作，找到最小公约数推进一寸是一寸。「君子以同而异」是更高的智慧：求同不灭异——尊重分歧的存在，甚至利用视角差异互补盲区。今日谈崩的事别急着定性：睽极则通，很多误会只是时间差。
careerEn: Opposition: fire rises as the lake sinks — motion in contrary directions. Expect more discord at the table today: crossed positions, misaligned goals, dialogues of the deaf. The hexagram's tactic is 'small matters, good fortune': where grand consensus fails, transact small — find the least common denominator and advance an inch at a time. The higher wisdom is the Image's: community that preserves individuality — respect the divergence, even harvest it; different angles cover each other's blind spots. And don't pronounce today's stalemates dead: opposition at its extreme turns to meeting — many a rift is merely a time lag.
loveZh: 火与泽同居一卦而性相违——像极了性格迥异的两个人：一个要热闹一个要安静，一个说逻辑一个讲感受。睽卦之日差异全面显形，吵点密集。破局的钥匙是把「不同」从问题重新定义为「配置」：TA的谨慎配你的冒进，你的浪漫配TA的务实——差异不是关系的裂缝，是关系的张力结构。今日练习一句话：「我们不一样，这没关系。」
loveEn: Fire and lake share one hexagram yet pull apart — exactly like two very different people: one craves the crowd, one the quiet; one argues logic, one speaks feeling. On Opposition's day the differences all surface and the flashpoints cluster. The unlock is redefining 'different' from defect to design: their caution pairs your daring, your romance pairs their pragmatism — difference isn't the crack in the bond, it's the tension that structures it. Today's sentence to practice: 'We're different. That's allowed.'
wealthZh: 睽主乖异，今日财务合作易生分歧：合伙人意见相左、家庭消费观打架、与客户对价格谈不拢。原则同卦辞：「小事吉」——大额的、需要高度共识的财务决定today一律押后，小额的、可逆的操作可以做。账目在分歧期务必清晰到分：睽卦之日的糊涂账，是明日决裂的伏笔。投资上警惕「视角偏执」：你今日容易只看见支持自己观点的信息，刻意读一读反方研报。
wealthEn: Opposition breeds financial discord today: partners split, household spending philosophies collide, price talks jam. The Judgment is the policy: 'small matters, good fortune' — defer every large decision requiring deep consensus; execute only the small and reversible. Keep accounts penny-precise during a rift: today's fuzzy ledger is tomorrow's rupture, pre-written. And guard against perspective lock-in when investing — today you will see only confirming evidence unless you deliberately read the bear case.
healthZh: 火炎上、泽润下，体内今日也易「上热下寒」：上面口干咽痛长痘，下面手脚发凉——中医所谓阴阳不交。调理方向是「引火归元」：泡脚（热水没过脚踝十五分钟）、少吃辛辣煎炸、晚间勿剧烈用脑。情绪层面的「睽」是内心打架：想休息又想上进、想社交又想独处——允许矛盾并存就是和解，今日不必强迫自己「想清楚」。
healthEn: Fire flaming up, water settling down — the body mirrors it today with heat above and cold below: dry throat, breakouts, and a parched mouth over chilly hands and feet — the classic failure of yin and yang to communicate. The correction is drawing the fire home: a fifteen-minute hot foot soak past the ankles, less fried and spicy food, no intense mental work late. The inner Opposition is the mind at war with itself — wanting rest and ambition, company and solitude at once. Letting the contradiction coexist is the reconciliation; you are not required to resolve yourself today.
xiangZh: 上火下泽，睽；君子以同而异。
xiangEn: Fire above, the lake below: opposition; thus amid all community the superior man retains his individuality.

guaciZh: 蹇：利西南，不利东北。利见大人，贞吉。
guaciEn: Obstruction: the southwest furthers, the northeast does not. It furthers to see the great man. Perseverance brings good fortune.
modernZh: 山上有水，蹇难之行。今日前路多阻，不宜硬闯。宜停下反省、绕道而行，或寻求有力者相助。见险能止即是智。
modernEn: Water on the mountain: obstruction. The direct path is blocked today — pause, reflect, take the detour, or ask for capable help.
careerZh: 蹇卦山上有水，前有高山后有险水——推进的路今日基本堵死：方案卡审批、资源要不到、关键人不配合。蹇卦给出的行动指南异常具体：「利西南，不利东北」——去平地别爬山，绕开死磕的正面，走资源顺畅的侧路；「利见大人」——今日求助不丢人，找那个能一句话打通关节的人；「反身修德」——推不动外界时回头修自己：补短板、理思路、把内功练在僵局里。见险而止不是怂，是「知矣哉」的智慧。
careerEn: Obstruction: water atop the mountain — the way forward is essentially sealed today: approvals stall, resources withhold, the key person won't engage. The hexagram's guidance is unusually concrete. 'The southwest furthers, the northeast does not': take the flat road, not the cliff — route around the frontal deadlock toward where resources flow. 'It furthers to see the great man': asking for help costs nothing today — find the one whose single sentence unlocks the gate. And 'turn inward to cultivate character': when the world won't move, work on yourself — close the skill gap, clarify the thinking, forge internal strength inside the stalemate. Halting before danger isn't timidity; the text itself calls it wisdom.
loveZh: 感情今日步履维艰：想沟通开不了口，想靠近被挡回来，努力像打在棉花上。蹇卦的忠告是停止「硬走」：反复逼近一个此刻走不通的话题，只会把路越走越窄。换「西南平地」：从轻松的话题、共同的朋友、日常的照顾这些平缓处重新接近。「反身修德」用在感情里是照镜子：僵局中你贡献了什么？今日想明白这个,比说服对方更解局。
loveEn: Love limps today: words won't start, approaches get deflected, effort lands like punches into cotton. Obstruction's counsel: stop forcing the pass — repeatedly charging a topic that won't open only narrows the road. Take the southwestern flat instead: re-approach through easy subjects, mutual friends, small daily care. And turn the hexagram's mirror inward: what is your contribution to this deadlock? Answering that today unlocks more than any argument would.
wealthZh: 蹇主险阻，资金今日多处受困：回款卡壳、提现延迟、变现困难。第一原则是勿「拆东补西」：用新的短债填旧的窟窿，是往蹇卦的山上再浇水。第二是「利见大人」：现金流真吃紧就找专业方案——正规重组、展期协商，而非民间高息。投资今日全面「见险而止」：看不懂的行情不参与，止损位到了就执行。蹇的反面教材只有一个字：闯。
wealthEn: Obstruction jams the money flow: receivables stall, withdrawals delay, assets resist liquidation. First principle: no robbing-Peter financing — patching old holes with new short debt pours more water on the mountain. Second: 'see the great man' — if cash flow is truly pinched, seek professional structures (formal restructuring, negotiated extensions), never informal high-interest money. In markets, halt before every danger today: sit out what you can't read, and execute the stop when it's hit. Obstruction has exactly one cautionary tale, and its name is 'forcing it.'
healthZh: 山上有水，行路难——蹇卦在身体上常应验于「下肢与行动力」：膝盖、脚踝、腰腿今日易感不适或旧伤敏感，运动全面降档：跑步改快走、爬山改平路、负重减半。「见险能止」的健身版是听疼痛的话：刺痛即停，别用意志力碾过身体的刹车灯。心理上的蹇（做什么都难的无力感）用最小单位破解：今日只求完成一件微小的事，僵局中的一小步，就是全部的胜利。
healthEn: Water on the mountain, the road hard going — Obstruction lands in the body as legs and locomotion: knees, ankles, and lower back run sensitive today, old injuries whispering. Downshift everything: run becomes brisk walk, mountain becomes flat path, loads cut by half. The training version of 'halting before danger' is obeying pain: sharp means stop — never will-power through the body's brake lights. And for the psychological obstruction — the heaviness where everything feels hard — break it with the smallest unit: accomplish one tiny thing today. In a deadlock, one small step is the entire victory.
xiangZh: 山上有水，蹇；君子以反身修德。
xiangEn: Water on the mountain: obstruction; thus the superior man turns inward and cultivates his character.

guaciZh: 解：利西南。无所往，其来复吉；有攸往，夙吉。
guaciEn: Deliverance: the southwest furthers. If there is still something to do, hastening brings good fortune; if not, return brings good fortune.
modernZh: 雷雨作而百果解，解除之象。今日困境松动，纠纷宜解不宜结。抓紧处理遗留问题，然后轻装前行，宽恕带来轻松。
modernEn: Thunder and rain release the tension: deliverance. Knots loosen today — settle old issues quickly, forgive, and travel light.
careerZh: 解卦雷雨作而百果草木皆甲坼——僵局松动，冰冻融解：卡了很久的审批下来了，对立的关系缓和了，压抑的氛围转晴了。解卦的行动纲领是「有攸往，夙吉」：有该办的事趁早办，解冻窗口不会一直开着。今日最该做的是「清欠」：把积压的任务、拖欠的回复、悬而未决的争议一鼓作气清完——「君子以赦过宥罪」，顺手原谅那些旧怨，卸下的包袱都是前进的燃料。
careerEn: Deliverance: thunder and rain break, and every seed-shell splits open — the deadlock loosens, the freeze melts: the long-stuck approval lands, the adversarial relationship softens, the oppressive air clears. The hexagram's directive: 'if there is somewhere to go, hastening brings fortune' — the thaw window won't stay open indefinitely. Today's priority is clearing arrears: the piled tasks, the owed replies, the suspended disputes — sweep them in one sustained push. And as the Image counsels, pardon the old grievances while you're at it: every burden set down converts to forward fuel.
loveZh: 雷雨过后天地一新，感情的郁结today迎来化解窗口：那场没吵完的架可以收尾了，那个误会可以说开了。解卦的和解技巧是「往得众」：主动走向对方的人赢得全部——先递台阶的不是输家，是解局者。和好之后学「田获三狐」：把矛盾里的「狐狸」（反复作祟的真正病根）找出来处理掉，只和好不除根，下场雷雨还会来。旧怨今日宜赦：原谅不是为对方，是给自己松绑。
loveEn: After the storm, the world is rinsed new — today opens the window for dissolving what's knotted: the unfinished fight can close, the misunderstanding can be spoken plain. Deliverance's reconciliation technique: the one who walks over first wins everything — offering the first step down isn't losing, it's solving. Once reconciled, hunt the three foxes: identify the actual recurring root inside the conflict and remove it — reconciliation without extraction just schedules the next storm. And pardon the old grievance today: forgiveness isn't for them; it unties you.
wealthZh: 解主解除，今日是财务「解套日」的最佳候选：纠缠的债务谈和解、套牢的仓位定去留、拖欠的款项去催收——雷雨之日万物松动，对方的态度也比平时软。「负且乘，致寇至」是解卦的理财警句：背着财物招摇（炫耀性消费、露富）会招来觊觎，解困之后尤其要低调。债务清偿后的第一件事：把「无债一身轻」的现金流重新导入储蓄，而不是消费反弹。
wealthEn: Deliverance unties — today is the prime candidate for financial unwinding: negotiate the tangled debt, decide the trapped position's fate, chase the overdue payment; on the day of thunder-and-rain everything loosens, counterparties included. The hexagram's money proverb: 'carrying a burden on display invites robbers' — flaunting wealth after relief attracts exactly the wrong attention; stay quiet especially once freed. And the first move after a debt clears: route the liberated cash flow into savings, not into rebound spending.
healthZh: 雷雨作，解——身体today进入「释放模式」：适合做一切「排」的养生：出一身透汗（运动或汗蒸）、做深度拉伸把僵住的筋膜松开、按摩推走肩颈的板结。情绪同理：憋了很久的话找人说掉，攒了很久的泪允许流掉——雷雨是天地的哭与喊，哭喊完就是甲坼的新生。「解而拇」：从最小处开始松——今晚先把眉头和下颌松开，再把肩放下来。
healthEn: Thunder and rain: the body enters release mode today. Do everything that discharges: sweat completely through (training or sauna), stretch deep to unglue the frozen fascia, massage the concrete out of the shoulders. Emotions follow the same physics: say the long-held words to someone, let the long-stored tears fall — the storm is heaven's own weeping and shouting, and after it every husk cracks open into growth. Start the loosening at the smallest joint, as the first line counsels: tonight, unknit the brow, unclench the jaw, and only then lower the shoulders.
xiangZh: 雷雨作，解；君子以赦过宥罪。
xiangEn: Thunder and rain set in: deliverance; thus the superior man pardons mistakes and forgives misdeeds.

guaciZh: 损：有孚，元吉，无咎，可贞，利有攸往。曷之用？二簋可用享。
guaciEn: Decrease combined with sincerity brings supreme good fortune without blame. Even two small bowls suffice for the offering.
modernZh: 山下有泽，损己益人。今日或有付出与割舍，但损小而得大。简化、节制、让利——诚意的舍，是明天的得。
modernEn: The lake gives to the mountain: decrease. Give something up today — simplify, economize, yield. Sincere loss now seeds later gain.
careerZh: 损卦山下有泽，泽自损其深以增山之高——今日的进阶策略反直觉：做减法。砍掉自留的杂务聚焦主线，让出次要的功劳换取盟友，接下短期吃亏但长期布局的任务。「损而有孚，元吉」：让利要让得真诚，被看见的算计等于没让。今日适合主动给自己「损」：审视手头摊子，哪三件事停掉之后世界照转？停掉它们。
careerEn: Decrease: the lake below gives up its depth to heighten the mountain — today's advancement strategy is counterintuitive: subtract. Cut the hoarded busywork and focus the mainline; concede the minor credit to gain an ally; accept the short-term-loss, long-term-position assignment. 'Decrease with sincerity: supreme fortune' — yielding must be genuine; visible calculation cancels the gift. And administer a voluntary decrease today: audit the portfolio and ask which three things could stop with the world still turning. Stop them.
loveZh: 感情的损卦功课是「惩忿窒欲」：克制脾气、收敛苛求——今日少发一次火、少提一个要求，关系的账户就多一笔存款。付出方面「二簋可用享」：心意不在排场，一碗亲手煮的面胜过敷衍的盛宴。若你总在计较谁付出多，今日试试主动多付出且不记账——损卦的秘密是：真心让出去的，会从别的门回来。
loveEn: Decrease assigns love its discipline: 'curb anger, restrain desire' — one temper withheld, one demand dropped, and the relationship account gains a deposit. As for giving, 'two small bowls suffice for the offering': sincerity needs no banquet — a bowl of noodles cooked by hand outweighs a lavish, absent-hearted feast. And if you've been keeping score of contributions, experiment today: give more, record nothing. Decrease's secret is that what is genuinely given away returns through another door.
wealthZh: 损主减省，今日是「断舍离」的财务日：砍订阅、退会员、清闲置——每月账单瘦身一次，胜过多接一单。投资上「损下益上」的启示是舍小保大：果断割掉小仓位的亏损标的，保全核心持仓的完整。该花的「损」别省：捐赠、请客、孝敬长辈——损卦世界观里这些不是支出，是种子。
wealthEn: Decrease economizes: today is finance's decluttering day — cancel the subscriptions, exit the memberships, sell the idle; one bill-slimming session beats one extra gig. The investing lesson of 'decreasing below to strengthen above': sacrifice the small to preserve the great — cut the minor losing positions cleanly and keep the core holdings intact. But don't economize on the giving kind of loss: donations, hosting, honoring elders — in this hexagram's cosmology those aren't expenses, they're seed.
healthZh: 损卦的养生纲领是减法医学：今日给身体减负——减一顿宵夜、减半勺糖、减一小时屏幕、减掉睡前的情绪性进食。「惩忿窒欲」的生理版：怒气与嗜欲最耗气血,今日各克制一次，等于进补一剂。身体的「损」也要有孚（诚）：节食减到头晕不是养生是自伤——减去伤害你的，留下滋养你的，这才是损卦的刀法。
healthEn: Decrease's health doctrine is subtractive medicine: unburden the body today — minus one midnight snack, half a spoon of sugar, one hour of screen, the emotional eating before bed. The physiology of 'curb anger, restrain desire': rage and craving drain vitality fastest — one act of restraint apiece today equals one dose of tonic. But bodily decrease also demands sincerity: dieting into dizziness isn't cultivation, it's self-harm. Cut what damages you, keep what nourishes — that is Decrease's knife-work.
xiangZh: 山下有泽，损；君子以惩忿窒欲。
xiangEn: The lake at the foot of the mountain: decrease; thus the superior man controls his anger and restrains his desires.

guaciZh: 益：利有攸往，利涉大川。
guaciEn: Increase: it furthers to undertake something; it furthers to cross the great water.
modernZh: 风雷相助，损上益下。今日贵人运旺，易得助力，宜乘势而进、大胆行动，兼利他人则如虎添翼。
modernEn: Wind and thunder reinforce each other: increase. Help arrives and ventures prosper today — act boldly, and share the benefit.
careerZh: 益卦风雷相薄，其势互增——今日是「扩张日」：申请资源易批、提议合作易成、招人纳贤易得。行动纲领是「见善则迁，有过则改」：看到更好的做法立刻学，发现自己的错误当场改——今日你的迭代速度就是竞争力。「利涉大川」：搁置的大计划（转型、出海、立项）今日适合正式启动。益卦的杠杆在「损上益下」：给团队让利、给下属授权，你放出去的能量会连本带息回来。
careerEn: Increase: wind and thunder amplifying each other — an expansion day: resource requests clear, partnership proposals land, good people say yes. The operating doctrine: 'seeing good, move toward it; erring, correct it at once' — your iteration speed is today's competitive edge. 'It furthers to cross the great water': the shelved big plan — the pivot, the new market, the initiative — launches well today. And Increase's leverage is 'decreasing above to increase below': share gains with the team, delegate real authority downward; energy released returns with interest.
loveZh: 风雷益，感情进入互相成就的增益循环：你支持TA的目标，TA助推你的成长——今日适合聊「我们各自想成为什么样的人」，并认真为对方的答案出一份力。单身者的益卦策略：让自己处于增值状态的人自带引力，你在学习与成长时的样子最动人。今日也宜「益」朋友之情：牵线、引荐、真诚夸奖——你为别人的感情账户充值，宇宙会给你的账户回款。
loveEn: Wind-and-thunder Increase: the relationship enters its mutual-amplification loop — you back their goal, they boost your growth. Today's conversation: 'who are we each trying to become?' — then genuinely invest in the other's answer. The single person's Increase strategy: people in a state of appreciation carry their own gravity — you are most attractive mid-growth. And increase your friendships too: introduce, recommend, praise sincerely — deposits into others' accounts have a way of clearing into yours.
wealthZh: 益主增益，是六十四卦里最适合「进攻」的财运日之一：加仓优质资产、扩大能带来现金流的投入（设备、技能、渠道）、谈提成与分成结构。「或益之十朋之龟，弗克违」：今日出现的重大机会带着「挡不住」的气质——但仍要过一道纪律闸门：它经得起你冷静一晚吗？「利用为依迁国」：大动作（换城市、换赛道的投资布局）今日议之皆宜。
wealthEn: Increase is among the canon's most offense-friendly money days: add to quality assets, expand cash-flow-generating investment (equipment, skills, channels), negotiate the commission structure. 'Someone increases him by ten pairs of tortoises — it cannot be refused': today's major opportunity arrives wearing inevitability — yet still pass it through one discipline gate: does it survive a night's sleep? Even the relocating-the-capital scale of moves — the city change, the sector rotation — discusses well today.
healthZh: 益卦是进补与进阶之日：身体对营养与训练的吸收率都在高位——今日的蛋白质、今日的力量训练、今日学会的新动作，转化率高于平常。适合上难度：加组、加重、报私教课、学新运动。「见善则迁」的健康版：听到有效的健康方法立刻试，今天的身体是最好的实验室。惟增益勿过界：以10%为进阶上限，益卦的反面是把进补吃成负担。
healthEn: Increase is the day of supplementation and progression: the body's absorption rate for both nutrition and training runs high — today's protein, today's strength work, today's newly learned movement all convert above baseline. Raise the difficulty: an extra set, more load, the coaching session, the new sport. The health version of 'seeing good, move toward it': test the promising method immediately — today's body is the best laboratory you'll get. One boundary: cap progression at ten percent; Increase inverted is nourishment turned burden.
xiangZh: 风雷益；君子以见善则迁，有过则改。
xiangEn: Wind and thunder: increase; thus when the superior man sees good he moves toward it, and when he errs he corrects it.

guaciZh: 夬：扬于王庭，孚号有厉。告自邑，不利即戎，利有攸往。
guaciEn: Breakthrough: the matter must be resolutely announced at the king's court. It does not further to resort to arms; it furthers to undertake something.
modernZh: 泽上于天，决断之象。今日须当机立断，把该说的说破、该了的了断。光明正大地解决，忌用强斗狠。
modernEn: The lake rises to heaven: breakthrough. Resolve the lingering issue openly and decisively today — clean resolution, never brute force.
careerZh: 夬卦五阳决一阴，泽水涨到天上——那个拖延已久的「小人」问题（违规的惯例、失职的环节、消极的钉子户）今日必须了断。夬的行动手册：「扬于王庭」——把问题摆到台面上公开处理，暗箱操作反失正当性；「孚号有厉」——申明利害时保持警觉，对方会反扑；「不利即戎」——公开归公开，不搞人身攻击与武力压制，用制度与程序完成切割。今日适合签解约、发通告、做最终决定：果决是仁慈，拖延才残忍。
careerEn: Breakthrough: five yang lines resolving to expel one yin — the lake risen to heaven. The long-tolerated problem — the irregular practice, the failing link, the entrenched blocker — must be settled today. The manual: 'proclaim it at the king's court' — handle it openly on the table; back-channel maneuvers forfeit legitimacy. 'Announce with sincerity — there is danger': stay alert while declaring; expect the counterattack. 'It does not further to take to arms': public yes, personal no — let institutions and procedure make the cut. Sign the termination, publish the notice, make the final call today: decisiveness is the mercy; procrastination is the cruelty.
loveZh: 感情里那个「就差一句话」的事，今日到了说破的时刻：悬而未决的关系该定性了，忍了太久的问题该摊牌了，该结束的纠缠该画句号了。夬卦的分寸感：「扬于王庭」——当面说、说清楚，但「不利即戎」——不翻旧账清算、不出恶言攻击。决断的姿态本身就是尊重：给对方一个明确的答案，好过让TA在猜测里耗着。今日说出口的话要能负责：夬者决也，决了就不回头。
loveEn: The matter in love that's been 'one sentence away' reaches its speaking hour today: the undefined relationship gets defined, the long-endured issue gets tabled, the entanglement that should end gets its period. Breakthrough's etiquette: say it face to face and say it whole ('proclaim at court') — but no prosecution of old grievances, no verbal violence ('arms do not further'). Decisiveness is itself a form of respect: a clear answer honors the other more than leaving them to guess. And own what you say today: 夬 means resolved — resolved doesn't turn back.
wealthZh: 夬主决断，今日财务上的「悬案」全部到期：该止盈的仓位、该止损的项目、该终止的合作、该拒绝的请求——每拖一天都在付利息。操作要「扬于王庭」：走正式流程、留书面记录，口头协议今日一律落纸。「其行次且」是夬卦的警告：犹豫不决、走走停停的执行最伤——要么不决，决了就一步到位。今日也适合排「财务地雷」：那笔一直不敢看的账，今天打开看。
wealthEn: Breakthrough calls every financial cold case due today: the position awaiting profit-taking, the project awaiting the write-off, the partnership awaiting termination, the request awaiting refusal — each day of delay accrues interest. Execute 'at court': formal process, written record; every verbal agreement gets papered today. The hexagram's warning is the hesitant walk — deciding, undeciding, half-executing wounds most: either don't resolve, or resolve in one complete stroke. And defuse the financial landmine today: the account you've been afraid to open — open it.
healthZh: 泽上于天，是溃堤前的满水位——夬卦的健康警报指向「积累到临界的隐患」：一直忍着的疼、反复出现的指标异常、心里知道该戒的习惯。今日的行动只有一个字：决。预约那个检查、戒断那个习惯（烟、酒、熬夜——挑一个，今天是最后一次）、开始那个拖延的治疗。「君子夬夬独行」：健康的决断不需要同伴附议，一个人也要执行。壮于前趾的教训：决心勿只停在嘴上——今天就走出第一步，但别在第一天用力过猛。
healthEn: The lake risen to heaven is the reservoir at breach level — Breakthrough's health alarm points at hazards accumulated to threshold: the pain long tolerated, the lab value repeatedly flagged, the habit you already know must go. Today's move is one word: resolve. Book that screening; quit that habit — cigarettes, alcohol, the 2 a.m. nights, choose one and let today be its last day; begin the deferred treatment. 'The superior man resolves and walks alone': health decisions need no seconder — execute solo if you must. And heed the first line's lesson about strength in the toes: resolution must leave the mouth and enter the feet today — just don't sprint the first mile of a marathon.
xiangZh: 泽上于天，夬；君子以施禄及下，居德则忌。
xiangEn: The lake has risen up to heaven: breakthrough; thus the superior man dispenses riches downward and shuns resting on his virtue.

guaciZh: 姤：女壮，勿用取女。
guaciEn: Coming to Meet: the maiden is powerful. One should not marry such a maiden.
modernZh: 天下有风，不期而遇。今日多有意外邂逅与机会，但美中或藏隐患，来路不明者勿轻信。小心甜蜜的陷阱。
modernEn: Wind under heaven: sudden encounters. Chance meetings and offers appear today — some promising, some traps. Verify before you commit.
careerZh: 姤卦一阴遇五阳，天下起风——不期而遇是今日主题：突然的邀约、意外的访客、天降的合作提案。姤卦对这类「遇」的判词一分为二：遇本身是机会（天地相遇，品物咸章），但「女壮，勿用取女」——那个看起来柔弱无害却生长迅速的因素，勿轻易迎进核心圈。今日对突然出现的人与事保持「系于金柅」的定力：可以接触、观察、备案，但重大承诺（签约、入伙、授权）押后。风行天下，消息今日传得快：你说的话半天内会到达意想不到的耳朵。
careerEn: Coming to Meet: one yin line arriving beneath five yang, wind rising under heaven — the unplanned encounter rules today: the sudden invitation, the unexpected visitor, the proposal from nowhere. The hexagram splits its verdict: meeting itself is opportunity (when heaven and earth meet, all things flourish), but 'the maiden is powerful — do not marry her': the factor that looks soft and harmless yet grows fast must not be welcomed into the core. Hold the 'bronze brake' toward whatever appears suddenly: engage, observe, file — but defer the binding commitments (contracts, partnerships, authorizations). And wind travels the whole sky today: your words will reach unintended ears within hours.
loveZh: 姤是「邂逅」之卦：今日偶遇心动对象的概率显著偏高——电梯里、活动上、朋友的朋友。但姤卦对邂逅的态度是「惊喜且验证」：一见如故的美好值得享受，闪电般升温的关系需要放慢——「女壮」的警示不分性别：过快过猛靠近你的人，动机需要时间检验。已有伴侣者今日注意边界：姤之遇常以「无害」的面目出现——一句暧昧的夸奖、一次单独的邀约，系于金柅，方为贞吉。
loveEn: Coming to Meet is the hexagram of the chance encounter: today's odds of meeting someone stirring run distinctly high — the elevator, the event, the friend's friend. Its attitude toward such meetings: delight, then verify. Enjoy the instant rapport; slow the lightning escalation — the 'powerful maiden' warning is gender-neutral: whoever closes distance too fast, too intensely, has motives that need time under light. The partnered should mind boundaries today: this hexagram's temptations arrive dressed as harmless — the ambiguous compliment, the one-on-one invitation. The bronze brake, applied early, is what the text calls correct and fortunate.
wealthZh: 姤主不期而至，今日的财务诱惑都带着「偶然」的包装：突然的内幕消息、偶遇的老同学项目、天降的中奖通知。姤卦的鉴别法写在卦辞里：主动来「遇」你的钱，九成是钩子——真正的机会很少追着人跑。「包有鱼，无咎」：已经在你锅里的鱼（现有资产、既有合作）好好经营；「包无鱼，起凶」：不属于你的鱼，伸手即凶。今日守住一个动作：任何要你「先转账」的遇合，直接拉黑。
wealthEn: Coming to Meet governs the unsolicited: today's financial temptations all wear coincidence as packaging — the sudden tip, the reunion-classmate's venture, the prize notification from nowhere. The hexagram's screening rule is in its own text: money that actively seeks you out is nine-tenths hook — genuine opportunity rarely chases. 'A fish in the tank: no blame' — tend what's already in your kitchen (existing assets, standing partnerships); 'no fish in the tank: misfortune' — reaching for fish that aren't yours is where the harm begins. One reflex to hold all day: any encounter requiring you to 'transfer first' gets blocked on the spot.
healthZh: 天下有风，无孔不入——姤卦的健康警报是「外邪入侵」：流感、病毒、过敏原今日活跃，人多密闭处戴口罩、勤洗手不是过度防护，是应卦而行。「一阴生」的深层提醒：大问题都始于微小的入口——今日身体出现的任何「小异常」（低烧、皮疹、隐痛）都值得认真对待，入侵者在门口时最容易拦截。生活方式的「姤」同样要防：第一支烟、第一次熬夜「就这一次」——微小的开端，是所有失控的标准剧本。
healthEn: Wind under heaven seeps through every crack — Coming to Meet's health alarm is invasion from outside: flu, viruses, and allergens run active today; the mask in crowded rooms and the washed hands aren't paranoia, they're alignment with the hexagram. The deeper reminder of 'one yin arising': every large problem begins at a small entrance — treat today's minor anomalies (the low fever, the rash, the vague ache) seriously; invaders are easiest to stop at the door. And guard against lifestyle 姤 too: the first cigarette, the first 'just this once' all-nighter — the tiny beginning is the standard script of every later loss of control.
xiangZh: 天下有风，姤；后以施命诰四方。
xiangEn: Wind under heaven: coming to meet; thus the prince issues his commands and proclaims them to the four quarters.

guaciZh: 萃：亨。王假有庙，利见大人，亨，利贞。用大牲吉，利有攸往。
guaciEn: Gathering: success. The king approaches his temple. It furthers to see the great man; perseverance furthers. Great offerings bring good fortune.
modernZh: 泽上于地，荟萃之象。今日人气旺盛，宜参加集体活动、整合资源人脉。众人拾柴火焰高，稍防人多中的小损失即可。
modernEn: The lake gathers on the earth: gathering. People and resources converge today — join in, organize, and connect. Just guard against small mishaps in the crowd.
careerZh: 萃卦泽上于地，水聚而成泽——人、资源、机会今日都在向你所在的场域汇聚：适合办大事——开发布会、组饭局、拉群组队、召集跨部门评审。「王假有庙」的启示是聚人要有「庙」：一个让众人愿意聚拢的名义与愿景——今日发起协作时先把「为什么」讲透。「除戎器，戒不虞」是萃卦的暗面提醒：人一多，摩擦、混乱与意外同步上升——活动要有预案，团队要有规则，热闹处要设纠错机制。
careerEn: Gathering: the lake forms upon the earth — people, resources, and opportunities converge on your ground today: right for the big convening — the launch, the dinner, the coalition, the cross-team review. 'The king approaches his temple': gathering needs a temple — a cause and vision worth assembling around; when you convene today, articulate the why before the what. And the Image's shadow-warning — 'renew the weapons to meet the unforeseen': crowds raise friction, confusion, and accident in proportion — every event needs a contingency plan, every team its rules, every festivity its error-correction.
loveZh: 萃主荟萃，今日的感情运在「人群」里：聚会、婚礼、团建、老友重逢——单身者今日的出席率就是桃花率，「萃如嗟如」的教训是别在角落叹气，走进人群中央。有伴者适合「双人社交」：一起见朋友、参加聚会——在人群中看见对方与他人相处的样子，常会重新心动。「引吉，无咎」：聚会中若有人为你们牵线搭桥，顺着善意走，被引荐的缘分今日质量高。
loveEn: Gathering pools the hearts: today's romantic fortune lives inside crowds — the party, the wedding, the reunion. Singles: attendance rate is flower rate today, and the text's own lesson is not to sigh in the corner — walk to the center of the room. Couples: socialize as a pair — watching your partner move among others often re-ignites the original spark. 'Being drawn brings fortune, no blame': if someone plays matchmaker or connector tonight, follow the goodwill — introduced connections run high-quality today.
wealthZh: 萃是「聚财」之卦：今日适合归拢——散落各处的账户做一次整合，零散的收入设一个汇聚池，家庭的资源开一次统筹会。合投、众筹、拼单类机会今日多且质量尚可，但「戒不虞」：人群聚集的地方骗局也聚集——凡「大家都投了」的项目，恰恰要单独验证。「大牲吉」：该投入的本钱别吝啬，聚的格局配得上聚的诚意。
wealthEn: Gathering is the wealth-pooling hexagram: consolidate today — merge the scattered accounts, route the stray income streams into one reservoir, convene the household resource council. Joint investments, crowdfunded ventures, and group purchases run frequent and decent today, but 'prepare for the unforeseen': where crowds gather, so do schemes — the project 'everyone's already in' is precisely the one to verify alone. And 'great offerings bring fortune': don't skimp the worthy stake; the scale of the gathering should match the sincerity of it.
healthZh: 泽上于地，人气汇聚——今日的健康增益来自群体：团课的能量、球场的多巴胺、聚餐的欢笑，都是独处给不了的滋养。但萃卦的健康风险同样来自「聚」：聚餐的暴饮暴食、人群的病菌交换、热闹后的疲惫空虚。策略是「有孚地聚」：赴宴七分饱、饮酒有上限、回家后留半小时独处「排空」——让社交成为充电而非放电。「除戎器」的身体版：出门前带好你的「装备」——水、药、口罩，有备则无虞。
healthEn: The lake gathers on the earth, and so does human warmth — today's health gains come from the group: the class's collective energy, the court's dopamine, the table's laughter — nourishment solitude cannot synthesize. But Gathering's health risks are also crowd-borne: the banquet binge, the pathogen exchange, the post-party hollow. Strategy: gather with sincerity and limits — seventy percent full at the feast, a ceiling on the drinks, and a half hour of decompression alone when home, so that socializing charges rather than drains. The bodily version of 'renewing the weapons': carry your kit — water, medications, mask. Prepared is unbothered.
xiangZh: 泽上于地，萃；君子以除戎器，戒不虞。
xiangEn: The lake gathers on the earth: gathering; thus the superior man renews his weapons to meet the unforeseen.

guaciZh: 升：元亨。用见大人，勿恤，南征吉。
guaciEn: Pushing Upward: supreme success. One must see the great man; fear not. Departure toward the south brings good fortune.
modernZh: 地中生木，升进之象。今日运势稳步上升，宜顺势求进，拜访贵人、争取机会皆吉。像树木一样，不急不停地向上。
modernEn: A tree grows from the earth: pushing upward. Steady ascent favors you today — seek out mentors and opportunities, and keep growing patiently.
careerZh: 升卦地中生木——种子在土里默默扎根，然后一节一节向上：今日的上升是「积小以高大」式的，没有跳跃，但每一步都算数。适合做「向上」动作：申请晋升通道、报名进阶培训、约上级聊发展路径——「用见大人，勿恤」：今日求见高层不必忐忑，被接纳的概率高。「南征吉」：主动出击、向光生长的方向走。升的纪律是「升虚邑」勿贪：不实的头衔与虚的扩张别接，树长得快更要根扎得深。
careerEn: Pushing Upward: wood growing within the earth — the seed roots quietly, then rises joint by joint. Today's ascent is 'accumulating the small to achieve the high': no leaps, but every step counts. Make the upward moves: apply for the promotion track, register for the advanced training, book the career conversation with your senior — 'see the great man, do not worry': audiences granted today go well. 'Departure south brings fortune': move toward the light, on your own initiative. The discipline: don't ascend into empty cities — decline the hollow title and the unbacked expansion; the faster the growth, the deeper the roots must hold.
loveZh: 升主渐长，感情today适合「升级一小格」：暧昧的推进到约会,约会的推进到确定，确定的推进到见家人——不跳级，但要进级。「允升，大吉」：你的靠近今日会被信任与接纳。经营长期关系的升卦心法是「积小」：感情的高度由无数小节点垒成——今日垒一块：一次专注的倾听、一个兑现的小承诺。忌「冥升」：只顾自己步步推进而不看对方状态的升，升到顶就是摔。
loveEn: Pushing Upward grows by degrees: promote the relationship exactly one notch today — ambiguity to a date, dating to definition, definition to meeting the family. No grade-skipping, but do advance the grade. 'Ascending with trust: great fortune' — your approach meets acceptance today. The long-game method is accumulation: a relationship's height is masonry of small moments — lay one brick today: a fully attentive listen, a small promise kept. The warning is 'ascending in the dark': climbing step after step without reading your partner's state tops out at a fall.
wealthZh: 升是复利之卦：财富按「地中生木」的方式增长——看不见的根系（储蓄率、技能、信用）决定看得见的高度。今日适合检修增长引擎：上调定投额度一档、把闲钱升级到更优的配置、投资自己的「向上技能」（谈判、外语、专业认证）。「王用亨于岐山」：该做的长期投入放心做，方向正确的钱不怕慢。忌追「升虚邑」式的标的：没有盈利根基却讲高增长故事的，让别人去接。
wealthEn: Pushing Upward is the compounding hexagram: wealth grows as wood grows in earth — the invisible root system (savings rate, skills, credit) determines the visible height. Service the growth engine today: raise the automatic contribution one notch, upgrade idle cash to a better allocation, invest in your own upward skills — negotiation, languages, certification. Long-term commitments in the right direction need not fear slowness. But decline the empty-city assets: high-growth stories with no earnings root are for someone else to catch.
healthZh: 地中生木的身体隐喻是「渐进负荷」——今日训练的关键词：比上次多一点点。多一组、多五分钟、多半公里——身体唯一认可的进步语法就是这个。升卦也主「向上」的体态：今日留意你的脊柱——含胸驼背是气的下沉，靠墙站五分钟、做几组开肩，把身体重新「种直」。「积小以高大」的养生总纲：别找突变的捷径，健康是长出来的，不是换出来的。
healthEn: Wood-in-earth is the body's metaphor for progressive overload — today's training keyword: slightly more than last time. One more set, five more minutes, half a kilometer further — this is the only grammar of progress the body recognizes. Pushing Upward also governs upright posture: attend to your spine today — the slumped chest is qi sinking; stand against a wall for five minutes, open the shoulders, replant yourself vertical. The whole regimen in one line: skip the mutation shortcuts — health is grown, not swapped.
xiangZh: 地中生木，升；君子以顺德，积小以高大。
xiangEn: Wood grows within the earth: pushing upward; thus the superior man, devoted in character, accumulates the small to achieve the great.

guaciZh: 困：亨。贞，大人吉，无咎。有言不信。
guaciEn: Oppression: success through perseverance for the truly great — no blame. When one has something to say, it is not believed.
modernZh: 泽无水，困顿之时。今日心力易乏，说话难被采信，不宜辩解与强求。守住志气，沉默做事，困境中自能守出转机。
modernEn: The lake has run dry: oppression. Words carry little weight today — argue less, endure more. Keep your spirit; the drought will pass.
careerZh: 困卦泽无水，湖床干涸——资源、支持与话语权today同时短缺：预算被砍、人手被抽、说话没人听。「有言不信」是困卦最扎心的判词：此时解释、争辩、表功都事倍功半——省下口舌。困卦的破局密码是「困而不失其所亨」：外部越困，内核越要稳——把必须做的事按最低配置做好，把多余的野心暂时归档。「致命遂志」：真正的强者在困境里不是等救援，而是认清哪些东西不能丢（专业、信用、心气），守住它们，困就困不死你。
careerEn: Oppression: the lake without water, the bed cracked dry — resources, support, and voice all short today: budgets cut, hands reassigned, words unheard. 'When one speaks, one is not believed' is the hexagram's cruelest line: explaining, arguing, and self-crediting all run at half efficiency now — save the breath. The code for surviving: 'oppressed, yet not losing what makes one thrive' — the harder the outside, the steadier the core must hold. Do the essential at minimum viable spec; archive the surplus ambitions temporarily. 'Stake your life on following your will': the strong don't wait for rescue in a drought — they identify what must not be lost (craft, credit, spirit), hold those, and the oppression cannot finish them.
loveZh: 感情的困卦时刻：说什么都像错、做什么都被误解——语言在今日的关系里暂时失灵（有言不信）。困卦的相处策略是「以行代言」：解释不如陪伴,争辩不如一杯递到手边的水。如果你是感到被困的一方：说不出的委屈写下来，或者暂时沉默但别冷暴力——「困于石，据于蒺藜」的警告是别在困中乱抓乱撞，越挣越紧。记住困卦的时间属性：这是「时之困」而非「命之困」——湖会再蓄水，话会再被听见。
loveEn: Love's Oppression hour: everything said sounds wrong, everything done gets misread — language itself malfunctions in the relationship today ('one speaks and is not believed'). The strategy: act instead of argue — presence beats explanation; a glass of water placed in their hand beats a winning rebuttal. If you're the one feeling trapped: write the unsayable down, or hold silence without weaponizing it — the text's warning about grasping at rocks and thorns means don't thrash in the trap; struggling tightens it. And remember Oppression's tense: this is a drought of the season, not of the destiny — the lake refills, and words will be believed again.
wealthZh: 困主匮乏，今日现金流进入「旱季管理」：只保留生存必需的支出，冻结一切可冻结的消费——「困于酒食」的警告是手头越紧越容易用小放纵安慰自己，奶茶与外卖是旱季的漏水点。绝对禁令：不以债养债，不碰高息贷——「困于赤绂」，那是把困变成绝境的标准路径。可做的事：盘点可变现的闲置、申请正规的展期与减免、接一份短期的活。旱季的功课是记住每一处漏水点：等水回来时，你会拥有最好的水库。
wealthEn: Oppression is scarcity: cash flow enters drought management today — keep only survival expenses, freeze everything freezable. The 'oppressed at wine and meat' warning: the tighter the money, the stronger the urge to self-soothe with small indulgences — the milk tea and the delivery order are the drought's leak points. Absolute prohibitions: no debt to service debt, no high-interest money — that is the standard route from hardship to ruin. What you can do: inventory the sellable idle goods, apply for formal extensions and relief, take the short-term gig. And the drought's assignment is mapping every leak: when the water returns, you'll own the best reservoir you've ever had.
healthZh: 泽无水是身体的「电量耗尽」图景：疲惫感今日格外深——不是懒，是真的没水了。困卦养生第一条律令：睡眠还债——今晚比平时早睡一小时，是所有恢复手段里性价比最高的。第二条：降低能耗——取消非必要日程，把「必须撑住」的清单砍到三项以内。第三条：小口补水——字面意义的（温水频饮）和比喻意义的（十分钟晒太阳、一首喜欢的歌、一次不带手机的散步）。「致命遂志」的健康版：困境里守住底线习惯——再累也刷牙、再丧也吃饭，底线在，反弹就在。
healthEn: The waterless lake is the body's dead-battery picture: today's exhaustion runs unusually deep — not laziness; the reservoir is genuinely empty. Oppression's first health law: repay the sleep debt — one hour earlier tonight is the highest-yield recovery instrument that exists. Second: cut the burn rate — cancel the nonessential, and trim the 'must power through' list to three items. Third: rehydrate in sips — literally (warm water, frequently) and figuratively (ten minutes of sun, one loved song, a phone-less walk). The health reading of 'staking life on one's will': hold the floor habits through the trough — teeth brushed however tired, meals eaten however low. While the floor holds, the rebound is already on its way.
xiangZh: 泽无水，困；君子以致命遂志。
xiangEn: The lake without water: oppression; thus the superior man stakes his life on following his will.

guaciZh: 井：改邑不改井，无丧无得，往来井井。汔至亦未繘井，羸其瓶，凶。
guaciEn: The Well: the town may change, but the well does not. If the rope does not quite reach, or the jug breaks, it brings misfortune.
modernZh: 木上有水，井养不穷。今日宜回归本职本分，把基础工作做扎实，服务他人不求速报。守好自己这口井，源源不断。
modernEn: The well nourishes without fail. Return to fundamentals today — do your core work well and serve steadily. A good well never runs dry.
careerZh: 井卦木上有水，井养而不穷——「邑可改而井不可改」：城郭变迁，井还是那口井。你的「井」是安身立命的核心专业：今日最值得做的是给井做维护——「井渫不食」的悲剧是井淘干净了却没人来喝：你的能力需要被看见，today把你的「井水」端出去——写一篇专业分享、帮同事解一个难题、在会上贡献一次干货。「汔至亦未繘井」的警告：事情做到九成九放弃，等于没做——今日手头那件差最后一步的事，把绳子放到底。
careerEn: The Well: water above wood, nourishment that never exhausts — 'the town may be moved, but not the well.' Your well is the core craft you live by, and today's best work is well-maintenance. Beware the tragedy of the third line — a well cleaned but not drunk from: competence unseen is competence wasted, so serve your water today: write the technical piece, untangle a colleague's problem, contribute the substantive point in the meeting. And heed the Judgment's warning about the rope that almost reaches: a task abandoned at ninety-nine percent equals zero — that nearly-finished thing on your desk: lower the rope all the way today.
loveZh: 井卦的感情观是「日常的滋养」：轰烈是烟花，井水是生活——今日的爱以最朴素的方式表达最有力：做一顿饭、续一杯水、记得TA随口提过的小事。「井冽寒泉食」是关系的理想态：清冽、可靠、随取随有——问自己：我是TA可以随时打水的井吗？旧关系的井today值得重新淘洗：老朋友、老感情，「井渫」之后又是活水。忌「井谷射鲋」：把心力浪费在滋养不了任何人的地方——单方面的消耗性关系，今日看清楚。
loveEn: The Well's philosophy of love is daily nourishment: passion is fireworks, well water is life — and today love speaks most powerfully in its plainest dialect: the cooked meal, the refilled glass, the remembered offhand detail. 'The well, clear and cold, is drunk from' names the ideal: clean, reliable, always there — ask yourself: am I a well they can draw from at any hour? Old wells reward re-dredging today: the old friend, the long relationship — silt cleared, the water runs live again. And avoid shooting fish in the well's mud: energy poured where it nourishes no one — the one-way draining relationship — deserves clear eyes today.
wealthZh: 井主稳定的源头活水，理财today聚焦「现金流资产」：能持续出水的东西——分红的股、收租的房、复购的客户、订阅的产品——都值得优先维护与加注。「无丧无得」是井卦财运的性格：今日别指望暴利，也不会有暴损，适合做基础设施类的财务工作——修预算、平账目、优化自动转账的「管道」。「羸其瓶，凶」的操作警告：打水的瓶子破了，井再好也白搭——检查你的「取水工具」：账户安全、支付习惯、单点故障，today加固一遍。
wealthEn: The Well is the steady spring: focus today on cash-flow assets — whatever keeps producing water: the dividend payer, the rented flat, the repeat customer, the subscription product — maintain and reinforce these first. 'Neither loss nor gain' is this hexagram's financial temperament: expect no windfall today and fear no crash — it's a day for infrastructure work: repair the budget, reconcile the books, optimize the automatic-transfer plumbing. And the broken-jug warning: if the vessel cracks, the finest well means nothing — inspect your drawing tools today: account security, payment habits, single points of failure. Reinforce them all.
healthZh: 井养不穷的健康隐喻是「基础补给系统」：水、三餐、睡眠——身体的三口井，今日逐一检修。饮水这口井today按字面执行：起床一杯温水，全天匀速补足——多数的疲惫与头痛，井里都有答案。「井渫不食」的身体版：好习惯建立了却三天打鱼——今日把那个「淘干净却没用起来」的习惯（买了的器械、办了的卡、下载的冥想App）重新启用。井的哲学是可持续：今日选的养生法，以「能做十年」为标准。
healthEn: The inexhaustible well maps to the body's basic supply systems: water, meals, sleep — three wells, each due an inspection today. Take the water-well literally: a warm glass on waking, steady sips all day — most fatigue and headache have their answer at the bottom of that well. The body's version of 'cleaned but not drunk from': the good habit established then abandoned — today, recommission the dredged-but-unused well: the bought equipment, the gym card, the meditation app. And the Well's philosophy is sustainability: choose today's health practice by one criterion — could I still be doing this in ten years?
xiangZh: 木上有水，井；君子以劳民劝相。
xiangEn: Water above the wood: the well; thus the superior man encourages the people at their work and exhorts them to help one another.

guaciZh: 革：巳日乃孚。元亨利贞，悔亡。
guaciEn: Revolution: on your own day you are believed. Supreme success through perseverance; remorse disappears.
modernZh: 泽中有火，变革之象。今日宜革故鼎新，改变过时的做法。时机成熟的改变会得到认同，但要先取信于人再动手。
modernEn: Fire within the lake: revolution. The time is ripe for real change today — win trust first, then transform boldly.
careerZh: 革卦泽中有火，水火相息，不变则相灭——旧的做法today确实到了该换的时候：过时的流程、失效的策略、名存实亡的合作。革卦的变革时刻表很严格：「巳日乃孚」——动手前先积累信任，让大家亲眼看到旧办法的失败与新方案的道理；「革言三就」——变革方案打磨三轮再宣布。今日适合提出改革、切换工具链、重构工作流。「大人虎变，其文炳也」：变革者自己要先脱胎换骨——最有说服力的改革宣言，是你自己的新样子。
careerEn: Revolution: fire within the lake — water and fire extinguish each other unless something changes. The old way has genuinely expired: the obsolete process, the failed strategy, the partnership dead in all but name. But Revolution keeps a strict timetable: 'on your own day you are believed' — accumulate trust before you move; let people see the old method's failure and the new one's logic with their own eyes. 'Talk of revolution three times' — polish the proposal through three rounds before announcing. Today suits proposing the reform, switching the toolchain, restructuring the workflow. And 'the great man changes like a tiger — his stripes shine': the reformer transforms first; your own new form is the most persuasive manifesto.
loveZh: 感情需要一场「版本升级」：老的相处模式（谁做家务、怎么吵架、多久约会）可能已经不适配现在的你们。今日适合开一次「关系改版会」：各自说一条希望改变的旧规则，共同定一条新的。革卦的分寸：「巳日乃孚」——改变要给对方适应期，今天宣布明天就要求到位是暴政；「不当革而革」同样凶——分清什么该革（过时的模式）什么不该革（对方的本性）。改造伴侣是幻觉，升级相处是艺术。
loveEn: The relationship is due a version upgrade: the old operating patterns — who does what, how you fight, how often you date — may no longer fit who you've become. Convene a redesign session today: each of you names one old rule to retire, then draft one new rule together. Revolution's proportion: change needs an adaptation period — announcing today and demanding compliance tomorrow is tyranny; and revolving what shouldn't be revolved is equally inauspicious — distinguish the outdated pattern (reformable) from your partner's fundamental nature (not a renovation project). Remaking a partner is a hallucination; upgrading a partnership is an art.
wealthZh: 革主除旧布新，今日是财务结构的「改朝换代日」：淘汰跑输的旧策略、换掉费率高的旧渠道、终止低效的旧配置——「巳日乃孚」的理财版：换仓换在验证之后，看到新方案的实际优势再动，勿为变而变。「君子豹变」：普通人的财务革命不必轰烈，像豹纹一样一块块换——本月换掉一个坏习惯（如冲动消费），下月升级一个工具（如记账方式）。「征凶，贞厉」的警告留给频繁折腾者：一年重构三次投资体系的人，革的不是命，是本金。
wealthEn: Revolution replaces the old order: today is regime-change day for your financial structure — retire the underperforming strategy, switch the high-fee channel, terminate the inefficient allocation. The financial reading of 'believed on your own day': rotate only after verification — move when the new approach's advantage is demonstrated, never change for change's sake. 'The superior man changes like a leopard': ordinary people's money revolutions work spot by spot — replace one bad habit this month (impulse buying), upgrade one tool the next (how you track spending). The 'persistence brings danger' warning belongs to the perpetual restructurer: whoever rebuilds their investment system three times a year is revolutionizing nothing but their principal.
healthZh: 泽中有火是新陈代谢的意象——革卦之日身体渴望「换血式」的更新：今日适合启动一项真正的改变——换掉沿用多年却无效的锻炼方式、彻底重构一日三餐的结构、或做一次「习惯大革命」（戒糖、戒熬夜、戒久坐，选最痛的那个革）。「治历明时」的养生版：给身体立新历法——固定的起床时间是所有节律的锚点，今日定下并执行。革的耐心条款：身体的改朝换代需要21天起步，「巳日乃孚」——坚持到身体相信你是认真的那天。
healthEn: Fire within the lake is the image of metabolism itself — on Revolution's day the body craves renewal at the cellular level: launch one genuine change today — replace the years-old exercise routine that stopped working, rebuild the architecture of your three meals, or stage a habit revolution (sugar, late nights, the chair — revolt against whichever hurts most). The health reading of 'setting the calendar in order': give the body a new calendar — a fixed wake time is the anchor of every rhythm; set it today and keep it. And Revolution's patience clause: the body's regime change needs twenty-one days minimum — persist until the day your body believes you mean it.
xiangZh: 泽中有火，革；君子以治历明时。
xiangEn: Fire in the lake: revolution; thus the superior man sets the calendar in order and makes the seasons clear.

guaciZh: 鼎：元吉，亨。
guaciEn: The Cauldron: supreme good fortune, success.
modernZh: 木上有火，鼎新之象。今日运势鼎盛，宜确立新格局、担当新任务。稳重如鼎，三足协力，大吉大利。
modernEn: The cauldron: establishing the new. Excellent fortune today for new structures, roles, and undertakings — steady, dignified, well-supported.
careerZh: 鼎卦木上有火，鼎烹而养贤——今日格局大开：适合确立「新政」——上任、开张、立制度、定章程；鼎是三足之器，今日搭班子讲究「三足鼎立」：能力互补的铁三角远胜一言堂。「正位凝命」是今日的关键动作：明确你的位置与使命——写下你这个角色存在的三个理由，砍掉与之无关的杂务。「鼎折足，覆公餗」的警告：责任超出承重就是灾难——接大任前先验自己的三足（能力、精力、授权）是否齐备。
careerEn: The Cauldron: fire over wood, the vessel that cooks and nourishes — today the frame opens wide: right for establishing the new order — taking office, opening doors, setting institutions, writing charters. The cauldron stands on three legs: build today's team as a tripod — a complementary triangle outperforms any one-voice room. 'Correct the position, consolidate the mandate' is the key move: write down the three reasons your role exists, and cut whatever serves none of them. And the broken-leg warning — the cauldron tips and spills the prince's meal: responsibility beyond load-bearing is catastrophe; before accepting the great charge, inspect your three legs — capability, energy, authorization.
loveZh: 鼎主「新阶段的确立」：感情today适合正名定分——求婚、订婚、公开关系、搬到一起，凡「把关系放进更正式的容器」的动作都顺卦。鼎烹生为熟的隐喻：爱情从生到熟不是变淡，是变得可以滋养人——今日欣赏关系里「熟」的部分：默契、踏实、被照顾的日常。「得妾以其子」的现代启示：关系的价值看它产出什么——你们在一起后各自变好了吗？这是比激情更硬的指标。三足之稳：感情、生活、事业三足平衡，鼎才立得住。
loveEn: The Cauldron establishes the new stage: today favors formalization — the proposal, the engagement, going public, moving in; any act that places the relationship into a more official vessel moves with the grain. The cauldron's metaphor — cooking the raw into the nourishing: love maturing isn't love fading; it's love becoming something that feeds you. Appreciate the cooked parts today: the shorthand, the steadiness, the daily being-cared-for. And the hexagram's hard metric: judge a relationship by what it produces — have you each become better since it began? That outlasts passion as an indicator. Remember the tripod: love, life, and work in balance are what keep the vessel standing.
wealthZh: 鼎为重器，主「大格局的正财」：今日适合布局有制度感的赚钱结构——签长约、定分成章程、把口头的合作装进合同的鼎里。「元吉，亨」的底气来自鼎的品性：稳、正、容量大——对应到理财是核心资产要像鼎一样经得起火烹（波动）。「鼎耳革，行塞」的提醒：鼎再好，耳坏了就抬不动——你的财务「提手」（变现渠道、退出机制）today检查一遍。「玉铉」是鼎卦的顶配：最高级的财富工具是你的信誉——今日守住每一个财务承诺。
wealthEn: The Cauldron is the great vessel, governing wealth of structure and scale: today suits building institutional earning arrangements — the long contract, the profit-sharing charter, the verbal partnership finally cast into a written vessel. The 'supreme fortune' rests on the cauldron's virtues — stable, upright, capacious: your core assets should likewise withstand the cooking fire of volatility. The broken-handles reminder: the finest cauldron can't be lifted without its ears — inspect your financial handles today: liquidation channels, exit mechanisms. And the jade carrying-bar is the top line's teaching: the most premium wealth instrument is your credibility — honor every financial promise today.
healthZh: 鼎主烹饪与滋养，今日的养生主场在厨房：认真做一顿饭——好food是「烹」出来的营养，外卖是「凑」出来的热量；今日至少一餐自己掌鼎。鼎的三足映射身体的三大支柱：睡眠、饮食、运动——哪只脚最短？今日补最短的那只，三足失衡的鼎装不住健康。「鼎颠趾，利出否」的妙义：偶尔把鼎倒过来清渣——今日适合做身体的「清空」：轻断食一餐、彻底整理药箱与补剂、清掉厨房里的过期与垃圾食品。
healthEn: The Cauldron rules cooking and nourishment: today's health arena is the kitchen. Cook one proper meal — good food is nutrition brought forth by fire; delivery is calories assembled by convenience. Take the cauldron's handle for at least one meal today. Its three legs map the body's three pillars — sleep, diet, movement: which leg is shortest? Lengthen that one today; a tilted cauldron holds no health. And the first line's odd wisdom — tipping the cauldron to empty the dregs: a good day for a bodily clear-out: skip one meal lightly, purge the medicine cabinet and supplements, evict the expired and the junk from the kitchen.
xiangZh: 木上有火，鼎；君子以正位凝命。
xiangEn: Fire over wood: the cauldron; thus the superior man consolidates his fate by making his position correct.

guaciZh: 震：亨。震来虩虩，笑言哑哑。震惊百里，不丧匕鬯。
guaciEn: Shock brings success. The shock terrifies for a hundred miles — yet he does not let fall the sacrificial spoon and chalice.
modernZh: 洊雷震动，惊而后安。今日或有突发消息令人心惊，但多为虚惊。处变不惊，自省自修，惊雷过后万物生长。
modernEn: Thunder upon thunder: shock. Sudden news may startle today — stay composed; the fright passes and leaves growth behind.
careerZh: 震卦洊雷发声，百里皆惊——今日职场可能有「惊雷」：突发的变动、紧急的消息、意料外的人事调整。震卦给出的应对范本是「笑言哑哑」与「不丧匕鬯」：真正的高手在巨响中手不抖——祭祀者手里的酒勺不洒一滴。实操三步：先稳（收到冲击性消息，先深呼吸再回复）、再核（惊雷多虚声，查证再反应）、后动（确认后的行动要快）。「恐惧修省」是震卦的馈赠：借这场惊吓审视自己——预案齐吗？依赖单点吗？震一次，补一课。
careerEn: The Arousing: thunder upon thunder, startling a hundred miles — expect a thunderclap at work today: the abrupt change, the urgent message, the unforeseen reshuffle. The hexagram's model response is written in its own lines: 'laughing words — ha ha' and 'he does not let fall the sacrificial spoon' — mastery is hands that don't shake inside the roar. Three practical steps: steady first (breathe before replying to the shock), verify second (most thunder is sound, not strike — confirm before reacting), move third (once confirmed, act fast). And 'in fear and trembling, examine yourself' is the thunder's gift: use the scare as an audit — are the contingencies in place? Any single points of failure? One shock, one lesson.
loveZh: 感情today可能有「惊」：突然的消息、意外的情绪爆发、或一场没预告的争执。震卦的核心区分：「震惊百里」的声势与「不丧匕鬯」的实质——惊吓的动静很大，实际的损失往往很小,别把音量当结局。若对方情绪如雷：别用雷回应雷，做那个「匕鬯不丧」的稳定者，风暴过后你的稳会被记住。「震来虩虩，后笑言哑哑」的完整剧本：惊后有笑——today的虚惊一场，晚上会变成两人的谈资。借震修省：这场惊吓暴露了关系里哪根没接好的线？接上它。
loveEn: Love may jolt today: sudden news, an unannounced eruption, a quarrel without preamble. The Arousing's core distinction: thunder that startles a hundred miles versus the spoon that never drops — the noise is enormous, the actual loss usually small; don't mistake volume for verdict. If your partner storms like thunder: don't answer thunder with thunder — be the one whose hands stay steady; after the storm, your steadiness is what gets remembered. The hexagram's full script runs 'terror, then laughing words': today's false alarm becomes tonight's shared story. And take the audit the thunder offers: which loose wire in the relationship did this jolt expose? Reconnect it.
wealthZh: 震主剧烈波动，今日市场与账面都可能「打雷」：暴涨暴跌、突发消息、黑天鹅擦肩。震卦的交易铁律：惊雷之中不下单——恐慌与狂喜时按下的按钮，90%会后悔；等「虩虩」（心跳）平复再看盘面。「震行无眚」的前提是有预案：今日检查你的防雷装置——止损单挂好了吗？应急金够六个月吗？密码与验证安全吗？「亿丧贝，跻于九陵，勿逐，七日得」：若today真有损失，勿急着追回——追损是第二次亏损的标准入口，七日后再算账。
wealthEn: The Arousing is violent volatility: markets and balances may thunder today — spikes, crashes, sudden headlines, a black swan passing close. The trading iron law: no orders inside the thunderclap — buttons pressed in panic or euphoria are regretted nine times in ten; wait for the heartbeat to settle before reading the tape. 'Moving with the shock brings no harm' only holds with preparation: inspect your lightning rods today — stops in place? Six months of emergency fund? Credentials secured? And the sixth line's counsel on sudden loss: 'do not chase it; on the seventh day you get it back' — chasing a loss is the standard entrance to the second loss. Settle accounts in a week.
healthZh: 洊雷入身是「应激」二字：今日的惊吓、噪音、冲击性消息都会直接敲打你的神经系统——心悸、手抖、胃部紧缩是震卦的躯体语言。急救三件套：延长呼气的深呼吸（吸4秒呼6秒，直接刹住应激轴）、双脚踩实地面感受支撑、说出五个眼前看到的东西（把神经从雷声里拉回当下）。「恐惧修省」的深层养生：适度的「惊」是免疫的操练——今日适合主动接触可控的小挑战（冷水澡、高强度间歇），让身体练习「受惊后回稳」的能力。晚间用温水泡脚安神：雷归地，人归眠。
healthEn: Repeated thunder entering the body spells one word: stress response. Today's shocks, noises, and jarring news strike the nervous system directly — palpitations, tremor, the clenched stomach are this hexagram's somatic vocabulary. The first-aid kit: extended-exhale breathing (four counts in, six out — a direct brake on the stress axis), both feet pressed into the floor, naming five visible objects to pull the nerves back from the thunder into the room. The deeper practice of 'fear and self-examination': controlled jolts train resilience — a fine day for deliberate small stressors (the cold shower, the interval sprint) that rehearse the return to calm. And a warm footbath at night settles it all: thunder returns to the earth; you return to sleep.
xiangZh: 洊雷，震；君子以恐惧修省。
xiangEn: Thunder repeated: shock; thus in fear and trembling the superior man sets his life in order and examines himself.

guaciZh: 艮其背，不获其身；行其庭，不见其人。无咎。
guaciEn: Keeping still. When a man has become calm within, he no longer sees his struggling self. No blame.
modernZh: 兼山艮止，静止之象。今日宜静不宜动，适合休整、冥想、整理思绪。行于当行，止于当止，心安即是归处。
modernEn: Mountain upon mountain: keeping still. Rest, reflect, and pause today — knowing when to stop is itself a form of progress.
careerZh: 艮卦兼山重立，止而又止——今日是职场的「静止日」：不接新活、不开新线、不做扩张性决定，把已经摊开的事收拢、归档、结项。「思不出其位」是艮卦的定海针：只想你职责内的事——别替老板焦虑战略，别替同事操心进度，把自己的一亩三分地耕到极致。「艮其背，不获其身」的深意：背是身体唯一看不见自己的部位——止于背，即止于「自我表现欲」：今日做事不求被看见，恰恰会做得最好。时止则止，时行则行：懂得停的人，才配得上下一次快。
careerEn: Keeping Still: mountain doubled upon mountain, stillness redoubled — today is the workplace's stationary day: accept no new tasks, open no new threads, make no expansionary decisions; instead fold up, file, and close what's already spread out. 'Thoughts that do not go beyond one's position' is the hexagram's anchor: think only within your mandate — don't carry the boss's strategic anxiety or your colleague's timeline; farm your own field to perfection. The deep reading of 'keeping the back still, not perceiving the self': the back is the one part of the body that cannot see itself — stilling the back means stilling the hunger to be seen; work unwitnessed today is precisely your best work. When it is time to stop, stop; when it is time to move, move — only those who can halt deserve their next acceleration.
loveZh: 艮主静止，感情today进入「静音模式」最健康：正在吵的架按暂停（不是冷战，是明说「我需要静一静，晚上再谈」）、催婚催承诺的话题今日不碰、连黏在一起的时间也可以少一点。「敦艮，吉」——厚实的安静是高级的陪伴：同处一室各做各事，不说话也不尴尬,这是关系的深水区标志。单身者today不宜出击：艮卦之日强行推进的关系带着勉强的指纹。「艮其限，列其夤」的警告：止要止得自然，硬憋着的克制会内伤——需要表达的情绪，写下来。
loveEn: Keeping Still puts love healthiest in silent mode today: pause the ongoing argument (not stonewalling — say aloud 'I need stillness; let's talk tonight'), leave the commitment-pressure topics untouched, and even reduce the glued-together hours. 'Noble-hearted keeping still: good fortune' — substantial quiet is companionship of a high order: two people in one room at separate pursuits, unspeaking and unawkward, is the deep-water mark of a bond. Singles: no campaigns today — connections forced on a stillness day carry the fingerprints of strain. And the third line's warning about clenched stillness: restraint held by force injures inwardly — what demands expression, write down.
wealthZh: 艮是「不动」的纪律：今日账户的最佳操作是零操作——不买、不卖、不调仓，「不动即是赚」在艮卦之日是字面真理（省下的手续费与错误都是收益）。可以做的是「盘点式」工作：对照目标检查配置、更新净值表、重读自己的投资原则——「思不出其位」的理财版：只赚认知范围内的钱，今日把「我的能力圈」清单写下来，圈外的机会再诱人也归零处理。消费同理：今日想买的东西全部进入48小时冷静清单。
wealthEn: Keeping Still is the discipline of not-moving: the optimal account action today is zero action — no buys, no sells, no rebalancing; 'not trading is earning' reads literally on this day (every fee and error avoided is return). What is permitted is inventory work: audit the allocation against its targets, update the net-worth sheet, reread your own written investment principles. The financial version of 'thoughts within one's position': earn only inside your circle of competence — write that circle down today, and process everything outside it as zero, however seductive. Consumption too: everything you want today enters the forty-eight-hour cooling list.
healthZh: 兼山之象是身体的「深度静养日」：今日最好的锻炼是不炼——或只做静功：冥想、瑜伽阴式、八段锦、散步。艮应脊背：今日给背部特别的照顾——靠墙静立五分钟、猫牛式十组、请人按一按肩胛之间那块常年紧张的区域（「艮其背」的字面践行）。「止」的神经科学版：今日安排至少一段20分钟的「无输入时间」——不看手机不听播客,让默认模式网络做它的清理工作。「时止则止」的睡眠令：今晚十点半，万念俱止。
healthEn: The doubled mountain decrees a deep-rest day for the body: today's best training is none — or the still kinds only: meditation, yin yoga, qigong, walking. Keeping Still corresponds to the spine and back: give yours particular care today — five minutes standing against a wall, ten rounds of cat-cow, and have someone press that permanently tight territory between the shoulder blades ('keeping the back still,' practiced literally). The neuroscience of stopping: schedule at least one twenty-minute no-input block — no phone, no podcast — and let the default-mode network run its housekeeping. And the sleep decree of 'stopping when it is time': ten-thirty tonight, all thoughts halt.
xiangZh: 兼山，艮；君子以思不出其位。
xiangEn: Mountains standing close together: keeping still; thus the superior man does not let his thoughts go beyond his situation.

guaciZh: 渐：女归吉，利贞。
guaciEn: Gradual Progress: the maiden is given in marriage — good fortune. Perseverance furthers.
modernZh: 山上有木，渐进之象。今日诸事宜循序渐进，按流程按节奏来，不可跳步。慢即是快，稳步的积累终成大树。
modernEn: A tree grows slowly on the mountain: gradual progress. Follow the proper sequence today — unhurried steps arrive surest.
careerZh: 渐卦山上有木，其长以年计——今日适合推进一切「按程序来」的事：走审批、排流程、按里程碑交付。渐卦的鸿雁从水边到磐石到陆地到高枝，一站不跳——你的晋升路径同理：today别谋求越级的捷径，把当前一级的「磐石」踩实。「居贤德善俗」的职场版：用日复一日的靠谱改变别人对你的预期——渐的力量不在单日，在于「每天都如此」的复利。适合启动以年为单位的事：一门深功夫、一个长项目、一份行业积累。
careerEn: Gradual Progress: a tree on the mountain, growing by the year — today favors everything procedural: the approval chain, the scheduled process, the milestone delivery. The hexagram's wild goose advances shore to rock to land to high branch, skipping nothing — your career ladder works identically: seek no grade-jumping shortcut today; plant this rung's footing solid instead. The workplace reading of 'abiding in worthy virtue': change what people expect of you through day-after-day reliability — gradualness draws its power not from any single day but from the compounding of 'every day, the same.' Right day to begin things measured in years: a deep skill, a long project, a body of industry knowledge.
loveZh: 渐是六十四卦里的「婚嫁吉卦」（女归吉），但它的祝福有条件：按节奏来。感情的鸿雁四站——认识、了解、信任、承诺，today检查你们在哪一站：站没踩稳就振翅，是关系里多数坠落的原因。今日适合推进「下一小步」：暧昧的约一次正式的会，稳定的见一次重要的人,成熟的谈一次具体的未来。「妇孕不育」的警告：跳过磨合直接到形式（闪婚、闪同居），形式会空心。渐的浪漫观：最动人的不是烟花，是年轮。
loveEn: Gradual Progress is the canon's marriage-blessing hexagram ('the maiden given in marriage: good fortune') — but its blessing has a condition: in sequence. The goose's four stations — meeting, knowing, trusting, committing: locate yourselves today, for taking wing from an unsteady station is how most relationships fall. Advance one small station today: the ambiguous pair books a real date, the stable pair meets someone important, the mature pair talks one concrete piece of future. The warning of 'pregnant yet not bringing forth': skipping the seasoning straight to the form — the flash marriage, the instant cohabitation — leaves the form hollow. Gradualness's theory of romance: what moves deepest isn't fireworks; it's tree rings.
wealthZh: 渐主循序积累，是「定投人格」的本命卦：今日适合检视你的渐进系统——自动转账在跑吗？比例该上调了吗？「鸿渐于磐，饮食衎衎」是渐卦理财的理想画面：站在磐石上从容吃喝——对应到财务是先把「磐石层」筑好（应急金、保险、无债），再谈进取。忌「鸿渐于陆」式的冒进：孤雁深入无水之地——脱离安全边际去追高收益，渐卦之日尤其要防。今日的小钱决定十年后的大钱：把这句话贴在下单按钮旁边。
wealthEn: Gradual Progress governs sequenced accumulation — the natal hexagram of the dollar-cost-averaging temperament: inspect your gradual machinery today — are the automatic transfers running? Is the percentage due a raise? 'The goose on the rock, eating and drinking at ease' is this hexagram's ideal financial picture: feasting calmly on bedrock — meaning build the rock layer first (emergency fund, insurance, no toxic debt) before any adventure. Beware the goose that strays onto the dry plateau — leaving your margin of safety to chase yield is today's specific temptation. Today's small money decides the decade's large money: tape that sentence beside the buy button.
healthZh: 山上有木的生长语法是「缓慢而不可逆」——今日健身的唯一准则：进步以「几乎察觉不到」为佳。跑量加5%、重量加2.5公斤、拉伸多一个呼吸——渐卦鄙视猛进：受伤的人90%倒在「今天状态好，多来点」上。「居贤德善俗」的健康版是改造环境：把水果放在视线里、把跑鞋放在门口、把手机赶出卧室——习惯的渐进靠环境的坡度，不靠意志的陡坎。以年计的健康观today立一项：选一个能做到八十岁的运动，从今天的第一次开始。
