healthEn: The mountain tree's grammar of growth is 'slow and irreversible' — today's sole training rule: the best progress is the barely perceptible kind. Five percent more distance, two and a half kilos more load, one breath longer in the stretch — Gradualness despises the surge: ninety percent of injuries fall on the sentence 'feeling great today, let's add more.' The health version of 'improving customs by abiding virtue' is environment design: fruit at eye level, running shoes by the door, phone exiled from the bedroom — habits ascend on the gradient of surroundings, not the cliff of willpower. And take the year-scale view today: choose one movement you could still be doing at eighty, and log its first repetition now.
xiangZh: 山上有木，渐；君子以居贤德善俗。
xiangEn: A tree on the mountain: gradual progress; thus the superior man abides in worthy virtue to improve the customs.

guaciZh: 归妹：征凶，无攸利。
guaciEn: The Marrying Maiden: undertakings bring misfortune. Nothing that would further.
modernZh: 泽上有雷，归妹之象。今日易因冲动或感情用事而失据，名分不正之事勿做。安守本位，避免草率承诺。
modernEn: Thunder over the lake: the marrying maiden. Impulse and misplaced eagerness mislead today — avoid rash promises and improper positions.
careerZh: 归妹卦雷上泽下，少女从长男，位不当也——今日的职场警报是「名分」：那个头衔含糊的职位、权责不清的项目、口头承诺的待遇——位不正则事不顺，接手前today务必把名分谈清楚：书面的职责、明确的汇报线、写进合同的条件。「征凶，无攸利」的分量：在名分未正时贸然向前冲，凶——今日不宜主动请战模糊地带的任务。若已身处「归妹」之位（实际干活名义不属于你），策略是「眇能视，利幽人之贞」：安静守正积累实绩，等一个正名的时机，而不是嚷着要。
careerEn: The Marrying Maiden: thunder over the lake, the young girl following the elder man — the positions are not proper. Today's workplace alarm is legitimacy: the vaguely titled role, the project with blurred authority, the verbally promised terms — where the position isn't proper, nothing proceeds properly. Before accepting anything today, settle the standing in writing: documented duties, explicit reporting lines, conditions in the contract. The Judgment's weight — 'undertakings bring misfortune': charging ahead while your standing is unratified is the specific danger; volunteer for no gray-zone missions today. And if you already occupy a marrying-maiden seat (doing the work without the name), the strategy is the second line's: the one-eyed who still sees — keep quiet rectitude, bank the evidence, and await the naming moment rather than demanding it.
loveZh: 归妹直面感情里最硬的问题：名分与本质。今日适合做一次清醒的关系体检：这段关系里，你是被珍视的「元配」，还是将就的「娣」？——不敢公开、永远差一步承诺、只在深夜出现的关系，today看清楚。「征凶」的忠告：位置不对时，越用力越受伤——催逼一个不想给名分的人，得到的名分也是空的。「愆期之志，有待而行也」是归妹的体面：宁可延期，不可将就。已在健康关系中的人today防「冲动越位」：情绪上头时许的重诺、赌气时说的狠话，都是雷上泽下的失位之言。
loveEn: The Marrying Maiden confronts love's hardest question: standing versus substance. Run a sober relationship audit today: in this bond, are you the cherished principal or the accommodated secondary? The relationship that can't go public, that hovers永远 one step from commitment, that appears only after midnight — see it clearly today. The Judgment's counsel: in a wrong position, effort itself wounds — a commitment extracted from someone unwilling to give it arrives already hollow. The hexagram's dignity is the fourth line's: 'the delayed marriage — waiting for the right time': better postponed than settled-for. And those in sound relationships guard against impulsive over-stepping today: the oath sworn at emotional peak, the cruel sentence said in spite — thunder-over-lake words from out of position.
wealthZh: 归妹主「名不正的钱」，今日财务上的第一纪律是查「名分」：产权在谁名下？合同的甲方是谁？这笔投资的底层资产写的什么？——所有权模糊的钱today最危险：代持的股、口头的合伙、写着别人名字的资产。「以杼有实」的警告延伸：华丽的筐子里可能没有果实——包装精美但底层空洞的产品，归妹之日格外多。人情消费today设限：为面子买单、为讨好透支，都是「归妹」式的错位支出——钱要花在有实的地方。
wealthEn: The Marrying Maiden governs money without proper standing: today's first financial discipline is title-checking. Whose name is on the deed? Who is the actual counterparty? What underlying asset does this investment actually hold? Ambiguously owned money is today's greatest hazard: shares held by proxy, verbal partnerships, assets registered to someone else. The top line's image extends the warning — the ornate basket containing no fruit: beautifully packaged, hollow-cored products swarm on this hexagram's day. And cap the face-driven spending: paying for appearances, overdrafting to please — misaligned expenditures in the Marrying Maiden's own style. Money belongs where the substance is.
healthZh: 雷上泽下，情绪牵动身体的错位——归妹的健康主题是「情绪化的代偿」：用食物安抚委屈（情绪性进食）、用熬夜报复白天（报复性熬夜）、用购物填补空虚——today这些「代偿回路」格外活跃，看见即是破解的开始：情绪来时先命名它（我现在是委屈/愤怒/孤独），再选一个不伤身的出口（走路、写下来、给朋友打电话）。「跛能履」的启示：带着情绪的瑕疵照样能好好生活——不必等心情完美才开始照顾自己。今晚给身体一个「正位」：按时上床，是对自己最基本的名分。
healthEn: Thunder above the lake — emotion tugging the body out of position: the Marrying Maiden's health theme is emotional compensation: soothing grievance with food, avenging the day with the 2 a.m. scroll, filling hollowness with purchases — these compensation circuits run especially hot today, and seeing them is the beginning of breaking them. When the feeling arrives, name it first (this is hurt / anger / loneliness), then choose a harmless outlet — the walk, the page, the phone call. The limping-walker's lesson: life can be lived well even with an emotional limp — you needn't await a perfect mood to care for yourself. And give the body its proper standing tonight: going to bed on time is the most basic legitimacy you owe yourself.
xiangZh: 泽上有雷，归妹；君子以永终知敝。
xiangEn: Thunder over the lake: the marrying maiden; thus the superior man understands the transitory in light of the eternity of the end.

guaciZh: 丰：亨。王假之，勿忧，宜日中。
guaciEn: Abundance has success. Be not sad; be like the sun at midday.
modernZh: 雷电皆至，丰大之象。今日运势丰盛，声势正隆，宜把握正午般的高光时刻成事。亦须明白日中则昃，盛时惜福。
modernEn: Thunder and lightning together: abundance. A peak moment — act while the sun is high, and cherish it knowing noon must pass.
careerZh: 丰卦雷电皆至，声与光同时抵达——今日是「高光运转日」：能见度、影响力、执行力同时在线,适合把最重要的动作放today：发布、答辩、竞标、路演。「宜日中」是丰卦的时间管理：像正午的太阳一样毫无保留地照——今日做事别藏一手，全力输出的样子本身就是竞争力。但「日中则昃」写在同一个卦里：极盛的下一刻是西斜——today的丰收要立刻转化为「过冬储备」：把成果文档化、把口碑变成推荐信、把高光时刻的人脉当场加上联系方式。丰而不骄，昃而不慌。
careerEn: Abundance: thunder and lightning arriving together — sound and light in the same instant. Today runs in highlight mode: visibility, influence, and execution all online at once; schedule the most consequential moves for today — the launch, the defense, the bid, the roadshow. 'Be like the sun at midday' is the hexagram's time management: shine without reservation — hold nothing back today; full output is itself the competitive display. But 'at noon, the decline begins' is written into the same hexagram: convert today's harvest into winter stores immediately — document the results, turn the praise into referral letters, exchange contacts with the high-noon connections before the light moves. Abundant without arrogance; declining, when it comes, without panic.
loveZh: 雷电皆至的感情是「盛大」二字：今日适合把爱过成节日——纪念日提前过、仪式感拉满、想说的爱意全额表达，丰卦之日的浪漫有加倍的回响。「遇其配主」：今日你们是彼此的最佳拍档，适合共同亮相、共同待客、共同完成一件有成就感的事。丰的阴影写在爻辞里：「丰其蔀，日中见斗」——最亮的时刻若起了遮蔽（猜疑、隐瞒），暗得比黑夜更彻底：today的丰盛容不下阴影，有话摊在阳光下说。盛宴之后记得留灯：热闹散场时的一句「今天真好」，比热闹本身更养感情。
loveEn: Love under simultaneous thunder and lightning spells magnificence: make today a festival — celebrate the anniversary early, max the ceremony, express the affection at full amount; romance on Abundance's day echoes at double volume. 'Meeting one's destined partner': today you are each other's best co-star — appear together, host together, finish something worth being proud of together. But Abundance's shadow is written in its own lines: 'the curtain of such fullness that the polestars appear at noon' — suspicion or concealment at the brightest hour darkens deeper than any midnight: today's fullness has no room for shade; say the thing in direct sun. And after the feast, leave one lamp lit: 'today was good,' said as the noise ends, nourishes more than the noise itself.
wealthZh: 丰主大丰收，今日的财务关键词是「落袋与储备」：到达目标价的仓位执行止盈、谈成的合同today签掉、该收的款趁丰日催回——「日中则昃」的理财铁律：丰收的顶点就是储备的起点，today的盈利至少三成转入「过冬账户」（应急金或稳健资产）。「丰其屋，蔀其家」的终极警告：把丰盛全部变成排场（豪宅、豪车、豪消费），丰就成了遮蔽自己的大房子——今日的犒赏性消费设一条线：庆祝可以，别把丰吃空。
wealthEn: Abundance is the great harvest: today's financial keywords are 'bank it and store it.' Execute the profit-taking on positions at target, sign the negotiated contract today, collect the receivables while the sun is high. The iron law of 'at noon, the decline': the harvest's peak is the granary's starting point — route at least thirty percent of today's gains into the wintering account (emergency fund or stable assets). The top line's terminal warning — the house made so grand it screens its own household: converting all abundance into display (the mansion, the car, the spectacle) turns plenty into the very thing that shades you. Draw one line under today's celebratory spending: toast the harvest, don't eat the seed corn.
healthZh: 雷电皆至的身体状态是「峰值输出」：精力、反应、情绪today都在高位——适合安排年度最难的那场运动挑战，身体今日给你的授权额度最高。但丰卦的养生智慧全在「宜日中」三个字的反面：正午过后主动降档——高强度安排在上午，下午转技术性练习，晚间只做恢复。「日中见斗」的身体信号要认识：极度兴奋中突然的心慌、眼前发黑，是盛极的刹车灯，立即停下。今晚的睡眠是丰收的封仓：兴奋之夜最容易报复性熬夜——庆祝到十点，收兵入眠，把丰的能量存进明天。
healthEn: The body under simultaneous thunder and lightning runs at peak output: energy, reflexes, and mood all high today — the right day for the year's hardest physical challenge; your body's authorization limit is at its annual maximum. But the hexagram's health wisdom lives in the inverse of 'the sun at midday': downshift deliberately after noon — intensity in the morning, technique in the afternoon, recovery only at night. Learn the 'stars visible at noon' signals: sudden palpitations or graying vision amid peak excitement are the brake lights of extremity — stop immediately. And tonight's sleep is the harvest's sealing: nights of triumph breed revenge-staying-up — celebrate until ten, then withdraw and bank Abundance's energy into tomorrow.
xiangZh: 雷电皆至，丰；君子以折狱致刑。
xiangEn: Both thunder and lightning arrive: abundance; thus the superior man decides lawsuits and carries out punishments with clarity.

guaciZh: 旅：小亨。旅贞吉。
guaciEn: The Wanderer: success through smallness. Perseverance brings good fortune to the wanderer.
modernZh: 山上有火，行旅之象。今日如身在旅途，宜谦逊低调、随遇而安，不宜轻率托付或深陷纠纷。谨慎行事，小亨可得。
modernEn: Fire on the mountain: the wanderer. Move like a traveler today — modest, adaptable, careful with trust. Small success attends the prudent.
careerZh: 旅卦山上有火，火行山间不停留——今日你在职场的身份是「旅人」：出差、驻场、借调、新环境的第一周，或任何「客场作战」的处境。旅卦的生存法则第一条是「柔顺谦下」：客场没有你的主权——少评论「你们这里不如我们那里」，多观察多入乡随俗。「旅即次，怀其资」：住所与资源要稳妥——出门在外，落脚点、证件、资金的安全冗余比什么都重要。「不留狱」的启示：旅途中的摩擦快速了结，勿留尾巴——客场的纠纷拖得越久越被动。旅人的优势也记得用：外来者的新鲜视角，正是今日你最值钱的东西。
careerEn: The Wanderer: fire moving across the mountain, resting nowhere — today you work as a traveler: the business trip, the client site, the secondment, the first week somewhere new, or any away-game situation. Rule one of the wanderer's code is soft humility: you hold no sovereignty on foreign ground — withhold the 'back home we do it better' commentary; observe much, adopt local custom. 'The wanderer reaches shelter, carrying his means': lodging and resources come first — away from base, the security margins on your accommodation, documents, and funds outrank everything. The 'no lingering lawsuits' teaching: settle travel frictions fast and leave no tails — away-game disputes compound against the visitor. And spend the wanderer's one asset deliberately: the outsider's fresh eye is the most valuable thing you carry today.
loveZh: 旅主「在路上的感情」：异地恋、旅行中的关系、或聚少离多的阶段——today的经营要点是「旅而有次」：给漂泊的感情一个固定的落脚点——每天固定时间的通话、每月固定的见面、共同期待的下一站，仪式性的锚点是异地感情的「客栈」。旅途邂逅today概率偏高且质量存疑：「旅琐琐」的警告——旅途中的轻率会招灾，心动可以，交付要慢。有伴同行者today是感情的试金石日：旅行中的疲惫与分歧最见真章——照顾好彼此的「怀其资」（各自的需要），一场好旅行抵得上十次约会。
loveEn: The Wanderer governs love in transit: the long-distance relationship, romance on the road, or a season of more parting than meeting. Today's craft is giving the wandering bond its inn — fixed anchor points: the same-hour daily call, the monthly reunion, the mutually awaited next destination; ritual anchors are what shelter a traveling love. Road encounters run frequent today and unverified: the hexagram's warning about the wanderer's petty carelessness — flutter freely, entrust slowly. And couples traveling together get the touchstone day: journey fatigue and route disputes reveal character like nothing else — guard each other's provisions (each other's needs), and one good trip will outweigh ten dinners.
wealthZh: 旅主「财在途中」，今日理财的关键词是「便携与安全」：出行相关的钱today格外留心——预订的押金、退改的条款、随身的现金卡证；「怀其资斧」的现代版：出门在外保持两套支付手段与应急现金。「旅焚其次」的警告延伸到投资：旅人不置重产——流动性差、退出难的投资（长锁定期、异地房产）today勿碰：你的处境需要随时能带走的资产。「射雉一矢亡」的智慧：旅途中的花费当作「一支箭换一只雉」——为体验付费值得，但每支箭都要射中点什么。
wealthEn: The Wanderer's money is money in motion: today's financial keywords are portable and secure. Travel funds deserve double care — the deposits, the cancellation clauses, the cash and cards on your person; the modern 'carrying one's means and axe': keep two payment methods and emergency cash whenever away. The burned-shelter warning extends to investing: travelers acquire no heavy estates — illiquid, hard-exit investments (long lockups, far-away property) are wrong for today's circumstances; your position calls for assets that travel. And the pheasant-for-one-arrow wisdom governs the road's spending: paying for experience is legitimate — but every arrow loosed should hit something.
healthZh: 山上之火烧不久驻——旅卦的身体课题是「移动中的自愈力」：时差、认床、饮食不服today都可能找上门。旅人健康三件套：水（飞行与奔波中的脱水是多数不适的源头，主动补）、眠（换环境的第一晚用耳塞眼罩造一个「便携的黑夜」）、肠胃（生冷谨慎，益生菌随身）。「不留狱」的身体版：旅途的小病症快处理勿硬扛——小药包是行囊里最智慧的克重。若today并无出行，旅卦的处方是「在熟悉中制造陌生」：换一条通勤路线、去一个没去过的公园——给感官一点旅行，是最便宜的身心重启。
healthEn: Fire on the mountain never camps long — the Wanderer's health assignment is resilience in motion: jet lag, strange beds, and unfamiliar food all come calling today. The traveler's health kit has three compartments: water (dehydration in transit underlies most road ailments — drink ahead of thirst), sleep (first night anywhere new, build a portable darkness with earplugs and eye mask), and gut (caution with the raw and cold; probiotics ride along). The bodily 'no lingering lawsuits': treat small road symptoms immediately rather than toughing them out — the little medicine pouch is the wisest weight in any luggage. And if today holds no travel, the Wanderer prescribes strangeness within the familiar: a different commute, an unvisited park — giving the senses a small journey is the cheapest full reboot there is.
xiangZh: 山上有火，旅；君子以明慎用刑，而不留狱。
xiangEn: Fire on the mountain: the wanderer; thus the superior man is clear-minded and cautious in penalties and protracts no lawsuits.

guaciZh: 巽：小亨。利有攸往，利见大人。
guaciEn: The Gentle: success through what is small. It furthers to have somewhere to go and to see the great man.
modernZh: 随风巽入，柔顺渗透。今日宜以柔克刚，用商量代替命令，反复沟通、渐进推进。追随明理之人，谦逊成事。
modernEn: Wind follows wind: gentle penetration. Influence softly and persistently today — suggestion succeeds where command fails.
careerZh: 巽卦随风相续，无孔不入——今日的影响力不靠权柄靠渗透：想推动一件事，用「申命行事」的方法——同一个信息，换着角度反复传达：会上提一次、私聊补一次、文档再落一次，风吹三遍，石头也会松动。适合做的事：游说、协调、跨部门斡旋、向上管理。「巽在床下」的警告：谦逊过度变成卑屈，反复过度变成没主见——风要有方向，你的每一次「随」都应服务于同一个目标。「利见大人」：today找那个能定调子的人，把你的风吹进TA的帆。
careerEn: The Gentle: wind following wind, entering every crevice — today's influence works not by authority but by permeation. To move something, use the Image's method — 'repeat the command': the same message, delivered from rotating angles: raised in the meeting, reinforced in the corridor, landed again in the document. Wind blowing three times loosens stone. Right work for today: lobbying, coordinating, cross-team diplomacy, managing upward. The under-the-bed warning: humility overdone becomes servility, repetition overdone becomes shapelessness — wind needs a heading; every accommodation should serve one target. And 'it furthers to see the great man': find the tone-setter today and blow your wind into their sail.
loveZh: 巽主柔入，感情today的正确姿势是「轻声细语的渗透」：想改变对方的某个习惯？正面施压必反弹，巽卦的做法是环境化影响——把水果洗好放在TA手边，比说十遍「少吃零食」有效。想表达在意？高频的微小关心（一句「到家了吗」、一杯顺手的咖啡）比低频的盛大表白更能进入人心。「进退，志疑也」的提醒：柔顺不是揣测——总猜对方想要什么不如直接问。今日适合谈那件一直不敢正面谈的事：像风一样，从最柔软的角度进入。
loveEn: The Gentle enters softly: love today works by quiet permeation. Want to change a habit of theirs? Frontal pressure rebounds; the Gentle's way is environmental — washed fruit placed at their elbow outperforms ten repetitions of 'eat less junk.' Want to show you care? High-frequency micro-attentions — the 'home safe?' text, the coffee carried over — enter the heart deeper than low-frequency grand gestures. The first line's caution about wavering: gentleness is not guesswork — asking directly beats forever divining their wishes. And today favors approaching the long-avoided conversation: like wind, enter from the softest angle.
wealthZh: 巽为风亦为「利市三倍」的商旅卦——今日财运偏向灵活与流通：适合谈判议价（柔性的反复磋商today格外有效）、做渠道与流量类的布局、盘活流动性差的资产。投资风格today宜「随风」：跟随明确的趋势做顺势配置，忌逆风重仓抄底。「频巽，吝」的理财警告：反复横跳的操作（今天定投明天赎回）是巽的病态——柔顺要有锚。「巽在床下，丧其资斧」：过度讨好式的让利（无底线降价、人情价）最终丧失本钱——生意可以柔，底价必须刚。
wealthEn: The Gentle is also the merchant's hexagram of threefold profit — today's money favors flexibility and flow: negotiate (soft, iterative bargaining works unusually well today), build channel and distribution positions, unfreeze illiquid assets. Investment style: ride the wind — allocate with the established trend; no heavy contrarian bottom-fishing against it. The 'repeated wavering brings humiliation' warning: flip-flopping operations — subscribing today, redeeming tomorrow — are gentleness gone pathological; softness needs an anchor. And 'under the bed, losing one's means': appeasement pricing — the bottomless discount, the friendship rate — eventually loses the capital itself. The manner may bend; the floor price may not.
healthZh: 随风入体的健康焦点是「呼吸系统」：today给肺一点专门的照顾——晨起开窗深呼吸十次、午后练一组呼吸法（吸四息七呼八）、过敏体质者留意风媒的花粉与尘螨。巽的运动处方是「柔韧系」：瑜伽、普拉提、太极——今日身体对拉伸的接受度高于对抗性训练。「无孔不入」的负面版是风邪：出汗后避风、空调不对头吹、颈后（风池穴的领地）围一条围巾的老讲究today有道理。心理层面的巽：把一个好念头反复吹给自己——同一句自我肯定说七天，比七句只说一次有用。
healthEn: Wind entering the body points at the respiratory system: give the lungs deliberate care today — ten deep breaths at the open morning window, one afternoon round of paced breathing (in four, hold seven, out eight), and pollen-and-dust vigilance for the allergic. The Gentle's exercise prescription is the supple family: yoga, Pilates, tai chi — the body receives stretching better than combat today. Wind's negative face is the draft: avoid it while sweating, aim the air conditioning elsewhere, and the old custom of a scarf at the nape has its physiology today. And the psychological Gentle: blow one good thought at yourself repeatedly — the same affirmation for seven days outworks seven affirmations said once.
xiangZh: 随风，巽；君子以申命行事。
xiangEn: Wind following wind: the gentle; thus the superior man spreads his commands abroad and carries out his undertakings.

guaciZh: 兑：亨，利贞。
guaciEn: The Joyous: success. Perseverance is favorable.
modernZh: 丽泽相连，喜悦之象。今日心情愉快，人缘极佳，宜交流研讨、分享喜悦。真诚的快乐感染他人，谨防乐极忘形。
modernEn: Lake joined to lake: joy. Good cheer and friendship flow today — share, discuss, celebrate; just keep the joy sincere.
careerZh: 兑卦丽泽相连，两泽互相滋润——今日是「言语生产力」的主场：谈判、销售、面试、汇报、团建，一切靠嘴的工作都有加成。「君子以朋友讲习」是兑卦的黄金场景：today约同行交流、组织复盘研讨、向同事请教——切磋中的收获今日翻倍。兑的原则是「和悦而不谄媚」：「和兑吉」（真诚的愉悦）与「来兑凶」（为取悦而取悦）一字之差天壤之别——today的每一句赞美都要有真实的锚点。「商兑未宁」的提醒：重要决定别在觥筹交错的愉快气氛里拍板——高兴时说Yes，冷静时会后悔。
careerEn: The Joyous: lake joined to lake, each replenishing the other — today belongs to verbal productivity: negotiation, sales, interviews, presentations, team-building — every mouth-powered task gets the bonus. 'Friends joining for discussion and practice' is this hexagram's golden scene: book the peer exchange, run the retrospective, ask the colleague to teach you — gains from sharpening against others double today. The Joyous's one principle: pleasant without obsequious — 'harmonious joy: fortune' versus 'contrived joy: misfortune' differ by a single word and a whole world: anchor every compliment today in something true. And the 'deliberating, not yet at peace' reminder: don't gavel important decisions inside the warm haze of a pleasant room — the yes said in delight gets regretted in sobriety.
loveZh: 兑为少女为口为悦——今日是感情的「甜言蜜语日」：把心里的欣赏说出口（具体地夸：不是「你真好」而是「你刚才处理那件事的样子真让我佩服」）、把积攒的趣事讲给TA听、一起看喜剧一起笑——today共同的笑声是最强的黏合剂。单身者today的魅力值在「谈吐」：有趣比好看更稀缺，约会请带上你的幽默感。「引兑」的警告：被诱惑性的愉悦牵着走（暧昧的甜、捧杀的甜）会失去自己——today的甜要能分辨来源。争执中的兑卦技巧：先说出一件对方做得对的事，谈话的水温立刻不同。
loveEn: The Joyous is the youngest daughter, the mouth, delight itself — today is love's sweet-speech day: say the stored admiration aloud (specifically: not 'you're great' but 'the way you handled that just now — I was impressed'), tell them the collected funny stories, watch a comedy and laugh together — shared laughter is today's strongest adhesive. Singles: today's charm lives in conversation — interesting is rarer than beautiful; bring your humor to the date. The 'seductive joy' warning: sweetness that leads you around — the flirtation's sugar, the flatterer's honey — costs you yourself; know today's sweetness by its source. And the Joyous's argument technique: open with one thing they did right, and feel the water temperature of the whole conversation change.
wealthZh: 兑主口舌生财：今日靠「说」的钱格外顺——销售提成、咨询服务、内容变现、直播带货，凡以表达为生产资料的收入today发力。谈判桌上的兑卦策略：先造愉悦的氛围再谈数字——一起笑过的对手，报价都会软三分。「孚于剥，有厉」的理财警告：因为「大家都说好」而信（社交型投资决策）是bounds卦最典型的亏钱姿势——朋友圈的财富故事、群里的一致看多，today都按噪音处理。愉悦性消费today设个「快乐预算」：为开心花钱天经地义，但快乐要记账。
wealthEn: The Joyous earns through the mouth: speech-powered income runs hot today — commissions, consulting, content, live selling; whatever monetizes expression accelerates. The negotiating strategy: build the pleasant air before touching the numbers — a counterpart you've laughed with quotes softer. The 'trusting the disintegrators: danger' warning names this hexagram's classic way to lose money: believing because everyone's saying it — the moneymaking story in the group chat, the unanimous bullishness — process all of it as noise today. And give delight a budget line: spending for joy is legitimate; joy still gets bookkeeping.
healthZh: 兑应口、喉与肺——today的健康检查从「口」开始：口腔溃疡、咽喉不适、牙龈出血都是兑卦的信号灯；用嗓多的人（老师、主播、销售）today给声带安排「课间休息」：每小时静音五分钟，温水常润。笑是兑卦开出的处方药：大笑一场对免疫、血管、情绪的收益有据可查——today主动寻找让你笑的人与内容。「和兑」的心理版：today练习「不带目的的愉悦」——不为社交不为发圈，纯粹做一件让自己开心的小事。夜间的兑卦提醒：聚会的愉悦别透支睡眠——十一点前，把笑声关进梦里。
healthEn: The Joyous corresponds to mouth, throat, and lungs — today's health check starts at the mouth: ulcers, throat irritation, bleeding gums are this hexagram's indicator lights. Heavy voice users — teachers, streamers, salespeople — give the vocal cords recess today: five silent minutes each hour, warm water often. Laughter is the Joyous's prescription drug: one real bout measurably benefits immunity, vessels, and mood — actively seek the people and content that make you laugh today. The psychological 'harmonious joy': practice pleasure without agenda — not for networking, not for posting; one small thing purely because it delights you. And the nighttime clause: don't let the party's joy overdraft the sleep — by eleven, tuck the laughter into your dreams.
xiangZh: 丽泽，兑；君子以朋友讲习。
xiangEn: Lakes resting one on the other: the joyous; thus the superior man joins with friends for discussion and practice.

guaciZh: 涣：亨。王假有庙，利涉大川，利贞。
guaciEn: Dispersion: success. The king approaches his temple. It furthers to cross the great water. Perseverance furthers.
modernZh: 风行水上，涣散复聚。今日宜化解隔阂、消融误会，让僵局松动；也宜整合分散的力量，聚沙成塔。
modernEn: Wind disperses over water: dissolution. Melt rigidity and misunderstanding today — scatter what blocks, regather what matters.
careerZh: 涣卦风行水上，吹散凝结之物——今日适合「化开」职场的板结：部门间的壁垒、会议里的僵局、团队心里的疙瘩。「王假有庙」的组织智慧：涣散的人心要用共同的愿景重新聚拢——today开会别先谈KPI，先谈「我们为什么做这件事」。适合的动作：重组任务分工、打散固化的小圈子、把积压的误会当面说开。「涣其群，元吉」的深意：打散小团体反而成就大团结——today若需要动组织结构，是吉日。「利涉大川」：化开内部淤结之后，大项目才能开船。
careerEn: Dispersion: wind over water, scattering what has congealed — today suits dissolving the workplace's clots: the inter-department walls, the meeting deadlock, the team's private knots. The organizing wisdom of 'the king approaches his temple': scattered hearts regather around shared meaning — open today's meeting not with KPIs but with 'why this work exists.' Right moves: reshuffle assignments, break up the calcified cliques, air the accumulated misunderstanding face to face. The deep reading of 'dispersing the factions: supreme fortune': dissolving small groups is what builds the large unity — if structure must move, today is auspicious for it. And 'it furthers to cross the great water': only after the inner silt disperses can the big ship sail.
loveZh: 感情里的「涣」是化冰：那场僵了几天的冷战、心里结了很久的疙瘩，today遇到了合适的风。化开的技巧藏在卦象里——风行水上是「轻柔地、大面积地吹」：不开批斗会,从轻的地方说起（「那天我说话重了」），让紧绷的水面先起涟漪。「涣奔其机」：化解要趁早趁势——today伸出的手别收回。有伴者也适合「涣」一下过度的粘连：各自见各自的朋友、保留各自的爱好——健康的关系需要风的流通，密不透风的爱会发酵成闷。
loveEn: Love's dispersion is the thaw: the cold war frozen for days, the knot tied for months, meets its right wind today. The technique is in the image itself — wind over water blows gently and broadly: no tribunal; start from the lightest place ('I was harsher than I meant that day') and let ripples loosen the tense surface first. 'Hastening to the support': thaw early, thaw on momentum — the hand extended today must not be withdrawn. Couples also benefit from dispersing the over-fusion: separate friends, preserved hobbies — a healthy bond needs wind circulation; love sealed airtight ferments into staleness.
wealthZh: 涣主离散，理财today的正面用法是「分散」：一次全面的风险分散检查——资产是否过度集中于单一标的、单一平台、单一币种？「涣其躬，无悔」：该分散的分散掉，无悔。负面警惕是「财富的涣散」：小额高频的漏出（订阅、打赏、凑单）today盘点一遍，风行水上时水汽蒸发得快。「涣王居，无咎」的启示：大的财务重组（合并账户、家庭资产重新配置）today宜议宜行。合作款项的涣卦提醒：alliance散伙或重组时，账要当面算清——风散之后，水落石出最干净。
wealthEn: Dispersion scatters — finance's positive use of it today is diversification: run the full concentration audit — is wealth overweighted in one asset, one platform, one currency? 'Dispersing the self: no remorse' — what should spread, spread it. The negative watch is wealth's evaporation: the small, high-frequency leaks — subscriptions, tips, cart-padding — inventory them today, for water vaporizes fast under moving wind. The 'dispersing the royal residence' teaching: large financial reorganizations — merging accounts, rebalancing the household allocation — discuss and execute well today. And the partnership clause: when alliances dissolve or reform, settle accounts face to face — after the wind passes, clear water over visible stones is the cleanest ending.
healthZh: 风行水上的身体处方是「发汗与行气」：today适合一切帮助「宣散」的养生——有氧到微微出汗、泡澡或汗蒸、刮痧走罐（专业处操作）——把郁在体表与情绪里的浊气吹散。涣应「气郁」体质：叹气多、胸胁胀、情绪淤——today的对治是「动中散」：走路时甩开手臂、唱歌时放开音量。心理的涣是「散念」：注意力被撕成碎片的现代病，today用一次「单任务半小时」对抗——只做一件事，让涣散的心神重新聚拢在一处。「王假有庙」的个人版：给自己一个凝心的锚点——一段晨间的静坐、一页日记，心涣则以仪式聚之。
healthEn: Wind over water prescribes sweating and moving qi: everything dispersive serves today — cardio to a light sweat, the hot bath or sauna, professional gua sha — blow the turbid stagnation out of the surface and the mood. Dispersion matches the qi-stagnant constitution: frequent sighing, rib-side fullness, silted emotions — today's remedy is scattering-through-motion: swing the arms wide while walking, sing at full volume. The mind's dispersion is the modern disease of shredded attention — counter it today with one half-hour of single-tasking: one thing only, letting the scattered spirit regather at a point. And the personal version of 'the king approaches his temple': keep one heart-gathering anchor — the morning sit, the journal page. When the mind scatters, ritual collects it.
xiangZh: 风行水上，涣；先王以享于帝立庙。
xiangEn: The wind drives over the water: dispersion; thus the ancient kings sacrificed to the Lord and built temples.

guaciZh: 节：亨。苦节不可贞。
guaciEn: Limitation: success. Galling limitation must not be persevered in.
modernZh: 泽上有水，节制之象。今日宜有节有度，管好时间、开支与情绪。合理的节制是自由，苛刻的束缚则难长久。
modernEn: Water over the lake: limitation. Set healthy limits today — on spending, time, and temper. Balanced restraint liberates; harshness fails.
careerZh: 节卦泽上有水，泽的容量就是水的边界——今日的关键词是「度」：工作范围要有度（超载的活学会说不）、承诺要有度（能给的期限才说出口）、加班要有度。「制数度」的今日实践：给自己立三条硬规矩——比如「六点后不接新需求」「会议不超过45分钟」「同时进行的项目不超过三个」。节卦的辩证在「苦节不可贞」：节制过狠会反噬——把日程排到窒息的自律不是节，是自虐。「安节之亨」：最好的节制是感觉不到勉强的节制——规矩要立在能长期执行的刻度上。
careerEn: Limitation: water held above the lake — the lake's capacity is the water's boundary. Today's keyword is measure: scope with limits (learn to decline the overload), promises with limits (speak only deadlines you can keep), overtime with limits. Today's practice of 'creating number and measure': legislate three hard rules for yourself — 'no new requests after six,' 'no meeting past forty-five minutes,' 'no more than three concurrent projects.' The hexagram's dialectic is 'galling limitation must not be persevered in': restraint turned punitive rebounds — the schedule packed to suffocation isn't discipline, it's self-harm. 'Contented limitation succeeds': the best rules are the ones that don't feel like force — calibrate them where they can run for years.
loveZh: 节卦给感情的箴言是「亲密有间」：再好的关系也需要边界的节度——今日适合和伴侣校准几条「节」：彼此的独处时间、消息回复的合理预期、与异性朋友交往的共识边界。「不出户庭，无咎」与「不出门庭，凶」的精妙对照：该守的界守住是智慧，不该守的界死守是错过——感情里分清哪些话该节制（伤人的气话），哪些话不该节制（爱意与感谢）。「甘节，吉」：两个人都舒服的规矩才是好规矩——单方面的忍让不叫节，叫透支。
loveEn: Limitation's maxim for love: closeness with intervals — even the best bond needs measured boundaries. Calibrate a few together today: solo time each person gets, reasonable reply-time expectations, agreed lines with opposite-sex friends. The hexagram's exquisite contrast — 'not going out of the courtyard: no blame' versus 'not going out of the gate: misfortune' — teaches the two kinds of limits: keeping the right ones is wisdom, keeping the wrong ones is loss. In love, ration the wounding words spoken in anger; never ration the affection and the thanks. 'Sweet limitation brings fortune': a good rule is one both people find comfortable — one-sided endurance isn't limitation, it's overdraft.
wealthZh: 节是「预算」的本命卦：today最应景的动作是给下个月立一份真实的预算——收入、固定、浮动、储蓄四栏，把「数度」制到每一类开支头上。节的技巧在「甘」：预算里必须给快乐留一个名正言顺的科目（娱乐金），全面禁欲的预算撑不过三周——「苦节」的失败是设计出来的。投资上的节卦是仓位纪律：单一标的的上限、总仓位的上限、亏损的止损线，today都写成数字。「不节若，则嗟若」的警告朴素而永恒：今天不节制,明天就叹息——每一笔透支的快乐都带着利息。
wealthEn: Limitation is budgeting's natal hexagram: today's fitting act is drafting next month's honest budget — income, fixed, variable, savings — imposing 'number and measure' on every category. The technique lives in 'sweet': the budget must contain a legitimate line item for joy — the fun fund — because the fully ascetic budget never survives three weeks; galling limitation fails by design. In investing, Limitation is position discipline: the single-name cap, the total-exposure cap, the stop-loss line — write them all as numbers today. And the plain, eternal warning of 'no limitation, then lamentation': what today doesn't restrain, tomorrow sighs over — every overdrafted pleasure carries interest.
healthZh: 节卦的养生总纲就是它的名字：一切以「节」为药——节食（七分饱是最古老也最被验证的长寿处方）、节酒、节屏幕、节夜。today适合做「节律」的重建：把最重要的三个生物钟锚点（起床、三餐、入睡）固定到误差半小时以内——身体不怕辛苦，怕的是没有节拍。「苦节不可贞」的健康警告同样重要：极端的断食、自虐式的训练计划、清教徒式的饮食法——凡执行起来痛苦的节制都难持久且常反弹。「安节」「甘节」才是身体愿意签的长约：找到那个「有点克制但不难受」的刻度，节在那里，寿也在那里。
healthEn: Limitation's entire health doctrine is its own name: everything moderated is medicine — food (seventy percent full remains the oldest and best-verified longevity prescription), alcohol, screens, late hours. Rebuild the rhythm today: fix the three great circadian anchors — waking, meals, sleep — to within half an hour's variance; the body doesn't fear hard work, it fears the absence of a beat. The 'galling limitation' warning matters equally in health: extreme fasts, self-punishing training blocks, puritan diets — restraint that hurts to execute neither lasts nor ends well. 'Contented limitation' and 'sweet limitation' are the only long contracts the body signs: find the setting that reads 'slightly restrained, never miserable' — moderation lives there, and so does longevity.
xiangZh: 泽上有水，节；君子以制数度，议德行。
xiangEn: Water over the lake: limitation; thus the superior man creates number and measure and examines the nature of virtue and conduct.

guaciZh: 中孚：豚鱼吉。利涉大川，利贞。
guaciEn: Inner Truth: pigs and fishes — good fortune. It furthers to cross the great water. Perseverance furthers.
modernZh: 泽上有风，诚信中孚。今日以诚待人无往不利，信任能感化人心，微小的力量也能成大事。守信，也择人而信。
modernEn: Wind over the lake: inner truth. Sincerity moves hearts today — trust given wisely returns multiplied.
careerZh: 中孚卦泽上有风，风与水的诚实感应；卦形外实内虚，是「心空而诚满」之象——today的职场货币是信任：兑现一个承诺、公开一次透明的进度、承认一个自己的失误——每一次「说到做到」都在给你的信用账户充值,而中孚之日的复利最高。「豚鱼吉」的深意：诚信要能感动最迟钝的对象——对最不起眼的合作方也守约，才是真孚。「鸣鹤在阴，其子和之」：真诚的声音自会有回应——today发出的邀请、提案、请求，因为可信而格外容易被接住。忌「翰音登于天」：调门高过实力的承诺，是中孚之日最大的破产。
careerEn: Inner Truth: wind over the lake, the honest resonance of breath and water; the hexagram's form — solid outside, open at the center — is the image of a heart emptied of pretense and filled with sincerity. Today's workplace currency is trust: fulfill one promise, publish one transparent status, own one mistake aloud — every kept word deposits into your credibility account, and on Inner Truth's day the compounding rate peaks. The deep reading of 'pigs and fishes — good fortune': sincerity must reach even the dullest recipient — keeping faith with the most negligible counterparty is what real truth looks like. 'The crane calls in the shade, and its young answer': the genuine voice gets answered — today's invitations, proposals, and requests land unusually well because they're believed. The one bankruptcy to avoid: 'the rooster's crow rising to heaven' — promises pitched above your actual power.
loveZh: 中孚是「真心换真心」的卦：today适合做感情里最需要勇气的事——说真话：那句藏了很久的「其实我很在乎你」、那个一直没敢坦白的软肋、那份没说出口的歉意。「我有好爵，吾与尔靡之」是中孚的极致浪漫：我有好酒，与你共醉——today把你最好的东西（时间、脆弱、真实的想法）拿出来分享，脆弱的坦诚是最深的亲密邀请。「得敌，或鼓或罢，或泣或歌」的警告：把心力耗在与人较劲的情绪拉锯里，是中孚的失格——today不玩心理战。信任的另一面today也要修：疑心是感应的静电——选择相信你选择的人。
loveEn: Inner Truth is the hexagram of heart answering heart: today calls for love's most courageous act — the true sentence: the long-hidden 'I care about you more than I show,' the never-confessed soft spot, the unspoken apology. 'I have a good goblet — I will share it with you' is this hexagram's ultimate romance: bring out your best — your time, your vulnerability, your unedited thoughts — and offer them; disclosed fragility is intimacy's deepest invitation. The warning of the third line — drumming, stopping, weeping, singing at an opponent's mercy: spending your heart in emotional tugs-of-war forfeits Inner Truth; no mind games today. And tend trust's other face: suspicion is static in the resonance — choose to believe the person you chose.
wealthZh: 中孚主信用，today是「信用资产」的盘点日：你的征信、你在关键的人心中的信誉、你对家人的财务承诺——逐项检视，信用是所有杠杆里成本最低的。交易层面的中孚法则：只与「豚鱼」级别都能验证的对手做——合同、资质、流水，一切可核验；反之，凡对方要求你「凭感觉相信」的（无凭据的口头承诺、查不到的资金盘）today一律出局。「有孚挛如」：财务上的深度绑定（联名、担保、合伙）只给经过时间验证的关系——签之前问：这个人五年里有没有一次对我食言？
wealthEn: Inner Truth governs credit: today, inventory your credit assets — your score, your standing in the minds of the people who matter, the financial promises you've made your family. Item by item — for credit is the cheapest leverage that exists. The trading law of Inner Truth: deal only where even the pigs-and-fishes level can be verified — contracts, licenses, statements, everything checkable; conversely, whatever asks to be believed on feeling — the undocumented verbal promise, the untraceable fund — exits today. 'Holding to truth binds tightly': deep financial binding — joint accounts, guarantees, partnerships — goes only to time-tested relationships. Before signing, one question: in five years, has this person ever once broken their word to me?
healthZh: 泽上有风，内虚而受——中孚的健康核心是「身心一致」：说谎与伪装的生理成本被严重低估——紧绷的社交面具直接写进肩颈与肠胃。today练习「对身体诚实」：累了承认累（而不是靠咖啡因掩盖）、饱了承认饱（而不是礼貌性再吃）、不想去的局承认不想去。「虚中」的养生实践：today留一段真正的空白——不填充信息不安排任务的半小时，让心像卦象的中间两爻一样空出来。诚实的社交是免疫力：研究反复证明，能说真话的关系网是最强的健康保护因子——today给那个「可以完全做自己」的人打个电话。
healthEn: Wind over the lake, receptive through an open center — Inner Truth's health core is congruence of body and mind: the physiological cost of lying and performing is grossly underpriced; the strained social mask writes itself directly into the shoulders and the gut. Practice bodily honesty today: admit tired instead of caffeinating over it, admit full instead of politely continuing, admit you don't want to go. The practice of the open center: keep one genuinely blank half hour today — no input, no task — letting the heart empty like the hexagram's middle lines. And honest connection is immunity: research keeps confirming that a network where you can speak truth is the strongest health-protective factor on record — call the person around whom you are完全 yourself today.
xiangZh: 泽上有风，中孚；君子以议狱缓死。
xiangEn: Wind over the lake: inner truth; thus the superior man deliberates over criminal cases and delays executions.

guaciZh: 小过：亨，利贞。可小事，不可大事。飞鸟遗之音，不宜上，宜下，大吉。
guaciEn: Small Exceeding: success. Small things may be done, great things should not. The flying bird should not strive upward but downward — great good fortune.
modernZh: 山上有雷，小有过越。今日宜做小事、守细节，不宜揽大事、图高远。谦恭一点、俭省一点，反而大吉。
modernEn: Thunder on the mountain: small exceeding. Keep things small and low today — extra humility and care in little matters bring luck; grand moves don't.
careerZh: 小过卦山上有雷，雷声被山体压低——今日的正确音量是「低」：适合做小事、细事、收尾事，不适合立大项、开大会、做大承诺。「可小事，不可大事」是明确的操作边界：today把年度计划收进抽屉，打开的应该是待办清单上那些五分钟能完成的琐碎——回复、归档、报销、跟催,小过之日清小事的效率惊人。「飞鸟遗之音，不宜上宜下」：姿态放低有意外之获——today主动做一件「过乎恭」的事：给帮过你的人道一次谢、向被你怠慢的人补一个歉。「弗过防之」：细节处过度谨慎today不是毛病，是护身符。
careerEn: Small Exceeding: thunder on the mountain, its voice pressed low by the mass — today's correct volume is quiet: right for small tasks, fine details, and closings; wrong for launching initiatives, convening summits, or making large promises. 'Small things may be done; great things should not' is an explicit operating boundary: file the annual plan away today and open instead the five-minute items — replies, filing, expenses, follow-ups; on Small Exceeding's day, clearing small things runs astonishingly efficient. 'The flying bird's cry: downward, not upward, is fitting': the lowered posture yields unexpected returns — perform one act of excess courtesy today: an overdue thank-you, an owed apology. And 'exceeding in precaution': over-carefulness in the details isn't a flaw today; it's armor.
loveZh: 小过的感情哲学：爱在小处见真章——today不办大事（不求婚不见家长不谈判），只做小事：把TA的水杯续上、顺路买TA提过的那样小东西、睡前多说一句「今天辛苦了」。「过乎恭」「过乎哀」「过乎俭」的感情版：礼貌可以过度一点（对最亲的人保持敬语级的尊重）、共情可以过度一点（TA的难过认真接住）、争执时的姿态可以低一点。「弗遇过之」的警告：错过当下的小信号（TA欲言又止的时刻），小事就会酿成大过——today把观察的分辨率调高一档。
loveEn: Small Exceeding's philosophy of love: truth shows at the small scale — today do nothing grand (no proposals, no meeting parents, no negotiations), only small: refill their glass, pick up that little thing they once mentioned, add one 'you worked hard today' before sleep. The three excesses, translated for love: courtesy in excess (formal-grade respect for your closest person), empathy in excess (their sadness caught with both hands), and a posture in disputes one notch lower than necessary. The 'passing by without meeting' warning: the small signal missed — the moment they almost said something — is how small matters ferment into great faults. Turn your observational resolution one setting higher today.
wealthZh: 小过主小额，理财today全面「小型化」：可以做的——小额定投、零钱理财、优惠积攒、小单试错；不可以做的——重仓、加杠杆、大额签约、一次性投入。「不宜上宜下」的投资译文：today偏好低估值、低波动、低位置的标的，警惕一切「飞得太高」的东西（暴涨的热点、天价的估值）。「密云不雨」再现于小过：大机会的条件未成熟，强求大动作必遇「飞鸟离之，凶」。小钱的复利今天值得重新敬畏：每天省下的三十块，二十年后是一笔真正的资产——小过之日算一算这笔账。
wealthEn: Small Exceeding rules the small denomination: finance miniaturizes today. Permitted: micro-investing, spare-change funds, accumulated discounts, small experimental positions. Forbidden: concentration, leverage, large signings, lump-sum deployments. The investment translation of 'downward, not upward': favor the low today — low valuations, low volatility, low positions — and distrust everything flying too high: the vertical hot theme, the nosebleed multiple. The dense-clouds-no-rain condition recurs here: the big opportunity's conditions aren't ripe, and forcing grand moves meets the flying bird's misfortune. And re-respect small money's compounding today: thirty saved daily is a genuine asset in twenty years — run that arithmetic on Small Exceeding's day.
healthZh: 山上之雷不惊天动地——today的身体也适合「小动」而非「大动」：散步代替长跑、拉伸代替力量日、八分饱代替大餐。小过的健康智慧全在「重视小症状」：那个持续三天的低热、偶尔的心悸、反复的口腔溃疡——「弗过防之，从或戕之」：不在小处设防，伤害就会从小处进来。today适合做的健康「小事」清单：预约一次体检、量一次血压、清一次药箱、剪指甲、换牙刷——微小的维护动作，是身体最日常的敬意。「过乎哀」的心理版：允许自己为小事难过——情绪的小过比情绪的积压健康得多。
healthEn: Thunder on the mountain shakes no heavens — the body too should move small today, not large: the walk instead of the long run, the stretch instead of the max-effort session, eighty percent full instead of the feast. Small Exceeding's health wisdom concentrates in taking small symptoms seriously: the three-day low fever, the occasional palpitation, the recurring ulcer — 'where no precaution is set at the small, harm enters by the small.' Today's list of health smallnesses: book the checkup, take one blood-pressure reading, purge the medicine box, trim the nails, change the toothbrush — minor maintenance is the body's daily form of respect. And the psychological 'excess in grieving': permit yourself sadness over small things — a small emotional overflow is far healthier than a large emotional backlog.
xiangZh: 山上有雷，小过；君子以行过乎恭，丧过乎哀，用过乎俭。
xiangEn: Thunder on the mountain: small exceeding; thus in conduct the superior man gives preponderance to reverence, in mourning to grief, in expenditure to thrift.

guaciZh: 既济：亨小，利贞。初吉终乱。
guaciEn: After Completion: success in small matters. Perseverance furthers. At the beginning good fortune; at the end, disorder.
modernZh: 水在火上，既济功成。今日诸事大体已成，宜收尾巩固、查漏补缺。成功之后最忌松懈，慎终如始则善。
modernEn: Water over fire: completion. Things are essentially done — consolidate, double-check, and guard against post-success carelessness.
careerZh: 既济卦水在火上，烹煮功成——六爻各得其位，是六十四卦中唯一「全对位」的卦：项目收官、任务达标、阶段完成，today适合做「完成时」的动作：验收、复盘、归档、庆功。但既济的全部智慧在「初吉终乱」四个字：完美的对位是最脆弱的平衡——today最重要的工作其实是「思患而预防之」：给刚完成的系统做压力测试、给交付的成果留维护文档、给庆功的团队排下一段航程。「曳其轮，濡其尾」的谨慎开局：新阶段的第一步放慢半拍。「终止则乱」：把「完成」当终点的人，正站在乱的起点。
careerEn: After Completion: water over fire, the cooking accomplished — every line in its proper place, the only perfectly positioned hexagram of the sixty-four: the project closes, the target lands, the phase completes. Today suits the perfective verbs: inspect, review, archive, celebrate. But the hexagram's entire wisdom compresses into four characters — 'beginning fortune, ending disorder': perfect alignment is the most fragile equilibrium there is, and today's real work is the Image's — 'reflect on trouble and arm against it in advance': stress-test the just-finished system, leave maintenance docs with the delivery, chart the next voyage for the toasting team. Open the new phase like the first line — wheels dragged, tail wetted: half a beat slower. For 'to stop at completion is to begin the disorder.'
loveZh: 既济的感情是「修成正果」的画面：关系稳定、默契成熟、诸事对位——today适合享受这份圆满：一顿纪念性质的晚餐、一次「我们做到了」的回顾。但既济给成熟关系的警告直白而深刻：「初吉终乱」——关系最大的敌人不是危机而是「完成感」：认定「已经稳了」的那天，就是停止经营的那天。today的「思患预防」：主动找一次新鲜——没去过的地方、没聊过的话题、没试过的共同爱好；「妇丧其茀，勿逐，七日得」的从容：小的失落与摩擦不必穷追，给时间七天。圆满不是终点站，是需要日日续费的会员。
loveEn: After Completion's love is the picture of arrival: the relationship stable, the shorthand mature, everything in position — enjoy the roundness today: a commemorative dinner, a 'look what we built' retrospective. But the hexagram's warning to mature love is blunt and deep: 'beginning fortune, ending disorder' — a relationship's greatest enemy isn't crisis but the sense of completion: the day you decide it's settled is the day the tending stops. Today's preventive arming: engineer one novelty — the unvisited place, the undiscussed question, the untried shared pursuit. And the composure of the second line — 'the lady loses her curtain; do not chase it; in seven days, recovered': small losses and frictions need no pursuit; give them a week. Completion isn't a terminus — it's a membership that renews daily.
wealthZh: 既济主「目标达成」，today财务上最该做的是「锁定」：到达目标的收益执行止盈、完成使命的仓位有序退出、实现的财务里程碑（还清某笔债、存够某个数）郑重记录——「既济」的钱要装进「既济」的袋子里。「思患预防」的理财清单：给这份成果上保险（字面的与结构的：保单、备份、法律文件）、检查资产的「防乱」机制（应急金是否完整、单点风险是否排除）。「濡其首，厉」的终极警告：成功之后的头脑发热（觉得自己是股神、报复性挥霍）是既济之乱的经典开场——today的自信打七折使用。
wealthEn: After Completion is the achieved target: finance's verb today is lock. Execute the take-profit on positions at goal, retire the mission-accomplished holdings in order, and formally record the milestone reached — the debt cleared, the number saved; money that has crossed the river belongs in a crossed-the-river pouch. The preventive-arming checklist: insure the achievement (literally and structurally — policies, backups, legal documents), and audit the anti-disorder mechanisms: emergency fund intact? single-point risks retired? The top line's terminal warning — 'head in the water: danger': post-success intoxication (deciding you're a genius, revenge splurging) is disorder's classic opening scene. Run today's confidence at seventy percent.
healthZh: 水火既济是中医的理想图景：心火下温、肾水上济——身心的「对位」状态today确实不错：睡眠、精力、情绪大概率在线。既济养生的全部要义是「防松懈」：状态好的日子最容易跳过锻炼、放纵饮食、熬夜庆祝——「初吉终乱」的身体版本每个人都经历过（假期后的体检单）。today的「思患预防」清单：把好状态的参数记录下来（体重、静息心率、睡眠时长——这是你的「既济基线」）、把维持它的习惯写成清单、给可能的「乱」设预警线（体重±2kg、连续三天睡眠<6小时即触发干预）。水在火上还有一层字面提醒：today注意水火平衡——多喝温水，少吃燥热，让体内的锅稳稳地煮。
healthEn: Water over fire is Chinese medicine's ideal diagram: heart-fire warming downward, kidney-water rising to meet it — and the body's alignment today is genuinely good: sleep, energy, and mood likely all online. After Completion's entire health doctrine is anti-complacency: good days are precisely when workouts get skipped, diets loosen, and celebrations run late — everyone has lived the bodily version of 'beginning fortune, ending disorder' (the post-holiday checkup). Today's preventive-arming list: record the good state's parameters (weight, resting heart rate, sleep hours — your completion baseline), write down the habits that maintain it, and set tripwires for disorder (±2 kg, three consecutive nights under six hours triggers intervention). And water-over-fire reads literally too: balance the elements today — more warm water, less heating food, and let the inner pot simmer steady.
xiangZh: 水在火上，既济；君子以思患而预防之。
xiangEn: Water over fire: after completion; thus the superior man reflects on misfortune and arms himself against it in advance.

guaciZh: 未济：亨。小狐汔济，濡其尾，无攸利。
guaciEn: Before Completion: success. But if the little fox, after nearly crossing, gets his tail wet, nothing furthers.
modernZh: 火在水上，未济待成。今日事情接近成功却未成，最后一步尤须谨慎。审慎分辨、各归其位——黎明前夜，前景可期。
modernEn: Fire over water: not yet complete. The goal is near but not reached — take the final steps with extra care; dawn is close.
careerZh: 未济卦火在水上，水火各居其所而不相济——六爻皆不当位，却是六十四卦的收官之卦：《易经》以「未完成」作结，本身就是宣言——事未成，正是事可成的形态。today你手头的事大概率处于「差最后一程」：方案九成、谈判将定、项目待验。未济的操作手册：「小狐汔济，濡其尾」——小狐狸快渡完河却湿了尾巴：最后一步的轻率毁掉全程,today的收尾动作以「过度谨慎」为standard；「慎辨物居方」——把每个未完成项归到明确的位置：能close的close，不能close的写清依赖与时间。黎明前的黑暗里，方向感比速度值钱。
careerEn: Before Completion: fire above water, each element in place but not yet cooperating — every line out of position, yet this is the canon's closing hexagram: the Book of Changes ends on 'not yet finished,' which is itself the declaration — the unfinished is precisely the form of the achievable. Your work today likely sits at the last leg: the proposal at ninety percent, the negotiation nearly settled, the project awaiting sign-off. The manual: 'the little fox, almost across, wets its tail' — carelessness at the final step erases the whole crossing; set today's finishing standard at excess caution. And 'carefully distinguish things and their places': sort every open item into an explicit slot — close what can close, and write dependencies and dates on what cannot. In the dark before dawn, bearing outvalues speed.
loveZh: 未济的感情是「将定未定」的悬置态：暧昧接近点破、关系接近承诺、和解接近达成——就差最后一层窗户纸。today的分寸艺术：可以「再加一把火」（一次更近的邀约、一句更明的话），但不可「逼到墙角」（最后通牒、当众摊牌）——「小狐濡尾」的感情版：99%的接近毁于最后1%的急躁。「有孚于饮食」的智慧：未定之事在轻松的场合最容易定——比起严肃的谈判，一顿放松的饭局里窗户纸自己会破。未济也是安慰之卦：如果今天的感情还没有答案，记住《易经》的编排——未济不是失败的结局,是永远可以继续的开篇。
loveEn: Before Completion suspends love at almost: the ambiguity near its naming, the relationship near its promise, the reconciliation near its landing — one paper pane from through. Today's art of proportion: add one more log to the fire (a closer invitation, a clearer sentence) but never corner them (the ultimatum, the public showdown) — the romantic reading of the fox's wet tail: ninety-nine percent of an approach dies in the last one percent of impatience. The top line's wisdom of 'sincerity over food and drink': undecided things decide themselves in relaxed rooms — over an easy dinner, the paper pane breaks on its own. And Before Completion consoles: if love has no answer today, remember where the Book of Changes placed this hexagram — the unfinished is not failure's ending, but the opening that can always continue.
wealthZh: 未济主「将成未成」，today财务上最危险的四个字是「就差一点」：将回的款别提前当作已回（不基于到账做支出决定）、将成的单别提前庆祝（不预支未落袋的收益）、将解套的仓别急着加仓摊平。「濡其首，有孚失是」的警告：黎明前最容易醉——因为「马上就好了」而放松风控，是未济之亏的标准剧本。today适合的动作是「渡河前的清点」：核对每一笔在途资金的真实状态、给每个「快成了」的项目标注真实概率。「君子之光，有孚，吉」：未济之年守住信用与耐心的人，把未完成变成了下一轮的先手。
wealthEn: Before Completion rules the almost-done, and finance's four most dangerous words today are 'just about there': the incoming payment isn't income until it lands (no spending decisions on money in transit), the closing deal isn't closed until signed (no pre-spending unbanked gains), the recovering position isn't recovered (no averaging down in celebration). The top line's warning — 'head wet in the water: sincerity lost': dawn's approach is when drowning happens, for 'almost there' is exactly when risk control relaxes — the standard script of this hexagram's losses. Today's right act is the pre-crossing inventory: verify the true status of every in-transit sum, mark every 'nearly done' venture with its honest probability. 'The light of the superior man, sincere: fortune': whoever keeps credit and patience through the unfinished year converts it into the next round's first move.
healthZh: 火在水上，水火未交——身体today可能处于「差一口气」的状态：调理见效但未痊愈、训练进步但未达标、作息改善但未稳固。未济的健康箴言是「坚持完最后一程」：见效就停药、好转就放纵，是慢性问题反复的第一原因——today把疗程、计划、习惯养成的「最后一段」标记出来，走完它。「慎辨物居方」的身体版：分清「将愈的余症」与「新起的信号」——前者继续原方案，后者及时就医。未济作为《易经》的最后一卦，也给健康一个终极视角：身体没有「完成时」——没有一劳永逸的健康，只有日日更新的照料。今晚睡前做一次全年最认真的拉伸：以未完成之心，做永不完成的功课。
healthEn: Fire above water, the elements not yet joined — the body today may sit at one breath short: the treatment working but not finished, the training improving but not at target, the sleep schedule better but not yet solid. Before Completion's health maxim: walk the final stretch — stopping medication at first relief, relaxing at first progress, is the number-one reason chronic issues cycle back. Mark the last segment of every protocol, program, and habit today, and complete it. The bodily 'careful distinguishing': separate the fading remnants of the old complaint (stay the course) from genuinely new signals (see the doctor). And as the canon's final hexagram, Before Completion leaves health its ultimate frame: the body has no perfect tense — there is no once-and-for-all health, only care renewed daily. Tonight, do the year's most attentive stretch: with an unfinished heart, at the work that never finishes.
xiangZh: 火在水上，未济；君子以慎辨物居方。
xiangEn: Fire over water: before completion; thus the superior man is careful in distinguishing things, so that each finds its place.
